activities.title: Kumari Ghar Courtyard Visit
activities.description: Step inside the courtyard of the Living Goddess's home — intricately carved peacock windows and a possible glimpse of the Kumari at her window.

activities.title: Street Dinner at Thamel Chowk Food Stalls
activities.description: End the day with sekuwa, momo, and fresh lime soda from the roadside stalls — budget-friendly and full of Thamel energy.

activities.title: Kopan Monastery Morning Garden Walk
activities.description: A short uphill walk north of Boudha leads to this peaceful Tibetan monastery — explore the terraced gardens and large prayer hall.

activities.title: Afternoon at Pashupatinath Ghats
activities.description: Sacred cremation ghats on the Bagmati River — witness Hindu rituals and the powerful atmosphere of Nepal's holiest site.

activities.title: Living Goddess Darshan at Kumari Ghar
activities.description: Step into the courtyard of the Living Goddess's home — the ornate peacock windows frame one of the most sacred spots in the valley.

activities.title: Akash Bhairab Temple at Indra Chowk
activities.description: Visit the open shrine to Akash Bhairab — a fierce blue deity whose four-storey temple anchors the ancient Indra Chowk marketplace.

activities.title: Gourmet Dinner at Dwarika's Hotel
activities.description: Exceptional Newari architecture and the finest Nepali dining in Kathmandu — choose from the heritage courtyard or Krishnarpan dining rooms.

activities.title: Art Exploration at Patan Museum
activities.description: Best museum in Nepal — classical Nepali bronze, stone, and wood art displayed in a beautifully restored Malla palace.

activities.title: Mahaboudha Temple and Hiranya Varna Mahavihar
activities.description: A medieval shikhara tower encrusted with 9000 Buddha images — hidden down a narrow alley in Patan's old quarter.

activities.title: Thangka Painting Studio Visit in Boudha
activities.description: Watch Tibetan masters create intricate Buddhist paintings in studios around the great stupa — ask questions freely.

activities.title: Farewell Dal Bhat at Narayan Cafe
activities.description: Rooftop cafe with Himalayan views — unlimited dal bhat with multiple curries to end a culturally rich trip.

activities.title: Indra Chowk Spice and Dry Fruit Market Walk
activities.description: Wander stalls piled with Nepali spices, dried ginger, Himalayan herbs, and gundruk — buy locally to take home.

activities.title: Juju Dhau Tasting at Indra Chowk Sweet Stall
activities.description: Small ceramic-pot servings of king curd sold from street carts near Indra Chowk — a preview before the Bhaktapur pilgrimage.

activities.title: Pumpernickel Bakery Early Breakfast in Thamel
activities.description: German-style bakery that's been feeding Thamel for decades — rye bread, croissants, and strong coffee before the cooking class.

activities.title: Old Kathmandu Street Snacks — Litti and Yomari
activities.description: Hunt down traditional Newari yomari dumplings and litti (wheat balls with filling) sold from small pushcarts in the old bazaar.

activities.title: Rooftop Sundowner Drinks at a Thamel Terrace Bar
activities.description: Thamel's popular rooftop hangout — sunset over the city with drinks and mezze platters after a long day of eating.

activities.title: Juju Dhau Pilgrimage to Bhaktapur
activities.description: The original source — king curd served in unglazed clay pots, slightly sour and perfectly set, from the traditional yoghurt shops of Bhaktapur.

activities.title: Pottery Square and Chiura Snack
activities.description: Watch potters throw pots on ancient foot-powered wheels and buy a bag of freshly pounded chiura (beaten rice) directly from producers.

activities.title: Arrival Thamel Evening Walk
activities.description: Settle in and explore the tourist hub — browse bookshops with Himalayan titles, outdoor gear stores, and handicraft stalls.

activities.title: Welcome Dal Bhat Dinner at Thakali Bhojnalaya
activities.description: Authentic Thakali set — dal bhat with multiple curries, gundruk soup, pickles, and unlimited refills to fuel five days of exploration.

activities.title: Bagmati Heritage Walk Along the Ghats
activities.description: Walk the ghats north from Pashupatinath — sadhus, shrine sellers, and forest-lined river banks dotted with ancient temples.

activities.title: Lunch at Stupa View Restaurant
activities.description: Rooftop dining with direct views across the great stupa — daal soup, noodles, and fresh juices.

activities.title: Bhaktapur Full Day Heritage Tour
activities.description: All three squares — Durbar, Taumadhi, and Dattatreya — explored with a local heritage guide.

activities.title: King Curd Tasting at Taumadhi Square
activities.description: World-famous Juju Dhau served in unglazed clay pots in the shadow of the five-storey Nyatapola Temple.

activities.title: Dattatreya Square and Peacock Window Photography
activities.description: The oldest temple square in Bhaktapur and the finest woodcarving in Nepal — the 500-year-old Peacock Window is a masterpiece.

activities.title: Breakfast at Nagarkot Farm House Cafe
activities.description: Farm-fresh eggs, whole wheat toast, and honey with mountain views from the terrace.

activities.title: Lunch at Changu Village Local Teahouse
activities.description: Basic but flavourful dal bhat at a tiny village teahouse at the foot of the temple complex.

activities.title: Dinner at Thamel House Restaurant
activities.description: Restored Newari townhouse with the best multi-course Nepali set menu in Thamel — book ahead for the rooftop table.

activities.title: Lunch at New Orleans Cafe Thamel
activities.description: Thamel institution — live music at lunch, good Nepali-continental food, and excellent fresh lime soda.

activities.title: Pashmina Factory Visit in Lazimpath
activities.description: See how raw cashmere becomes a pashmina — weaving, dyeing, and finishing on traditional looms.

activities.title: Heritage Suite Tour and Check-in at Dwarika's
activities.description: Personal butler shows you through the hand-carved corridors, courtyard pools, and your antique-furnished suite — every brick is a piece of Newari history.

activities.title: Ayurvedic Welcome Treatment at Dwarika's Spa
activities.description: Two-hour arrival Abhyanga full-body warm oil massage using Himalayan herbs — releases travel fatigue and prepares the senses for the days ahead.

activities.title: Krishnarpan 22-Course Tasting Dinner
activities.description: Nepal's supreme dining experience — 22 courses of classical Nepali cuisine served on beaten-metal thalis in a lantern-lit Newari dining room.

activities.title: Champagne Breakfast with Mountain Views
activities.description: Return to Dwarika's for a leisurely terrace breakfast — freshly pressed juices, eggs Benedict, and a glass of Chandon to celebrate the flight.

activities.title: Private Guided Patan Museum Tour
activities.description: After-hours curator-led tour of Nepal's finest classical art — bronzes, stone sculptures, and wood art in a restored Malla palace.

activities.title: Dinner at 1905 Restaurant Kathmandu
activities.description: Housed in a century-old Rana villa — Continental and Nepali fusion served in elegant dining rooms with live piano music.

activities.title: Panchakarma Spa Session at Dwarika's
activities.description: Three-hour Panchakarma detox treatment — Shirodhara oil-stream head therapy, herbal steam, and deep tissue massage.

activities.title: Sundowner Cocktails at Dwarika's Poolside Terrace
activities.description: Evening drinks by the heritage courtyard pool as the Kathmandu skyline glows at dusk — Himalayan mojitos and local cheese platters.

activities.title: Luxury Souvenir Shopping at Baber Mahal Revisited
activities.description: Rana-era stables converted into Nepal's finest boutique complex — pashmina, silver jewellery, and artisan gifts for home.

activities.title: Free Back-Route Climb at Swayambhunath
activities.description: Skip the main staircase — the back path through the forest is free, quiet, and rewards with the same panoramic view.

activities.title: Cheapest Chiya and Puri at Asan Bazaar
activities.description: NPR 20 masala tea and fried puri at a roadside stall in the most atmospheric bazaar in old Kathmandu — eat standing like a local.

activities.title: NPR 180 Dal Bhat Lunch at a Local Bhojnalaya
activities.description: Small family-run eatery with unlimited dal bhat for NPR 150–200 — the cheapest and most filling meal in Kathmandu.

activities.title: Morning Kora at Boudhanath Stupa
activities.description: Walk the great circumambulation path with pilgrims — only pay the entry fee if you want to go up onto the stupa dome itself.

activities.title: NPR 200 Unlimited Dal Bhat near Boudha
activities.description: Eat where the monks eat — simple benches, unlimited refills, and a generous helping of achar for the true Nepali experience.

activities.title: Budget Street Dinner at Chhapan Dukan Area
activities.description: A row of street-food stalls near the old bazaar — chatpate, fried noodles, and fresh fruit chaat for under NPR 200.

activities.title: Kumari Ghar Courtyard — Free Entry
activities.description: The inner courtyard of the Living Goddess's palace is free to enter — look for the ornate peacock windows and wait patiently for a glimpse of the Kumari.

activities.title: Peaceful Afternoon at Garden of Dreams
activities.description: Best NPR 400 spent in Kathmandu — neoclassical pavilions, koi ponds, and bougainvillea far from the city noise.

activities.title: Kumari Ghar Carved Window Detail Shoot
activities.description: The peacock windows are the finest woodcarving in Kathmandu — use a telephoto and shoot from the courtyard at 200–300mm for best results.

activities.title: Golden Hour Elevated Stupa Shot at Boudhanath
activities.description: Secure a rooftop table at a surrounding cafe by 4 PM — the stupa turns gold at 5:30 PM and the prayer-flag silhouettes against the sky are unmissable.

activities.title: Breakfast and Review Cards at Swayambhu Cafe
activities.description: Refuel at a simple hilltop cafe while reviewing the morning shots — eggs, toast, and strong chiya before heading to Bhaktapur.

activities.title: Nyatapola Staircase Symmetry and Crowd Shots
activities.description: Shoot the temple staircase from ground level for the paired-guardian-statue symmetry, or from a cafe balcony for crowd-and-pagoda wide angles.

activities.title: Monkey Temple Family Adventure at Swayambhunath
activities.description: Kids love counting the 365 steps, spotting the giant painted eyes, and feeding the resident monkeys — bring snacks and a sense of humour.

activities.title: Wood-Fired Pizza Lunch at Fire and Ice
activities.description: Kathmandu's most famous pizzeria — Neapolitan-style wood-fired pizzas big enough for the whole family, great pasta for fussy eaters.

activities.title: Garden of Dreams Family Evening Stroll
activities.description: Enclosed neoclassical garden with wide lawns, fountains, and lit pavilions — a calm end to a busy first day away from traffic noise.

activities.title: Kids' Pottery Wheel Lesson at Pottery Square
activities.description: Children aged 5+ can try spinning the traditional foot-powered wheel with a patient master potter — messy, joyful, and unforgettable.

activities.title: Juju Dhau King Curd Family Treat at Taumadhi
activities.description: World-famous Bhaktapur yoghurt served in unglazed clay pots — slightly sour, perfectly set, and universally loved by children.

activities.title: Dal Bhat Dinner Back in Kathmandu
activities.description: Return to Thamel for a hearty Thakali set — dal bhat with multiple sides and gundruk soup, plenty for tired family appetites.

activities.title: Farewell Dal Bhat Family Lunch at Thakali Kitchen
activities.description: The perfect last meal — unlimited dal bhat with five curries and gundruk soup, served fast and with genuine warmth.

activities.title: Sacred Morning Kora at Boudhanath Stupa
activities.description: Begin the retreat with 3 slow circumambulations of the great stupa — spin each prayer wheel, breathe the incense, and arrive before the crowds at 6 AM.

activities.title: Vegetarian Lunch at OR2K Thamel
activities.description: Fully vegetarian Middle Eastern and Nepali menu in a quiet Thamel courtyard — lentil soup, hummus, and fresh salads to sustain the meditative pace.

activities.title: Evening Boudhanath Kora and Butter Lamp Offering
activities.description: Return at dusk when the stupa is lit and the circumambulation crowd is largest — join a butter lamp offering at one of the small shrines.

activities.title: Bagmati Ghat Meditation Walk
activities.description: Walk the forested riverbank north of Pashupatinath in the post-ritual quiet — a deeply peaceful stretch of ghats, stone shrines, and forest birds.

activities.title: Dakshinkali Temple and Forest Surroundings
activities.description: Drive 22 km south through sal forest to the Kali temple at the valley's edge — powerful Tantric energy, animal offerings, and dramatic gorge setting.

activities.title: Breakfast at Himalayan Java Coffee Thamel
activities.description: Strong flat white and whole-grain toast — a gentle re-entry to the modern world before the final sessions.

activities.title: Tibetan Incense and Mala Bead Shopping at Boudha
activities.description: Pick up Tibetan incense sticks, a mala rosary, and Himalayan singing bowl as mindful souvenirs — negotiate gently and with good humour.

activities.title: Budget Dal Bhat Lunch at Lakeside Local Joint
activities.description: Eat lunch at a simple roadside restaurant on the Lakeside strip — unlimited dal bhat with two vegetable sides for NPR 200.

activities.title: Sunset Rowboat Drift on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Rent a wooden rowboat for NPR 400/hour and drift toward the mirror-perfect Annapurna reflection — one of the most iconic views in Nepal.

activities.title: Annapurna Panorama at Sarangkot Sunrise
activities.description: Shared jeep from Lakeside for NPR 300 — Annapurna South, Machhapuchhre (Fishtail), and Dhaulagiri all at once in brilliant April dawn light.

activities.title: Budget Breakfast at a Lakeside Bakery
activities.description: Freshly baked bread, banana pancakes, and filter coffee at one of the Lakeside budget bakery-cafes — fuel for the World Peace Stupa hike.

activities.title: Dal Bhat Lunch at Local Restaurant near Lakeside
activities.description: Simple bhojnalaya near Lakeside — unlimited dal bhat with pickles and fresh vegetables for NPR 200, eaten with local workers.

activities.title: Early Morning Phewa Lakeside Walk
activities.description: The lake is glassiest before 7 AM — walk the shoreline path for the Machhapuchhre reflection before any wind disturbs the surface.

activities.title: Begnas Lake Day Escape by Local Bus
activities.description: NPR 50 local bus east of Pokhara to the serene Begnas Lake — no tourists, just fishing boats, locals bathing, and the Annapurna backdrop.

activities.title: Final Lakeside Dinner at Busy Bee Cafe
activities.description: Pokhara's most popular budget cafe — good pizza, cold Everest beer, and a lively crowd of trekkers and backpackers to swap stories with.

activities.title: Gear Check and Rental at Lakeside Shops
activities.description: Rent missing items — sleeping bag, trekking poles, gaiters, and a down jacket for high altitude.

activities.title: Trail Lunch at Hile Tea House
activities.description: Hot noodle soup and sweet milk tea at a family-run trail tea house before the steep climb.

activities.title: Dawn Departure Through Rhododendron Forest
activities.description: Start early to reach Ghorepani before clouds roll in — trails are carpeted in fallen rhododendron blooms.

activities.title: Nangethanti Lunch with Mountain Views
activities.description: Dal bhat at 2430m — Machhapuchhre towers directly ahead while you eat.

activities.title: Tea House Dinner and Early Night at Ghorepani
activities.description: Dal bhat set dinner, rest your legs, and set your alarm for 4 AM — the big day is tomorrow.

activities.title: Return to Ghorepani for Breakfast
activities.description: Descend back in morning light and refuel with pancakes and black tea before the descent to Tadapani.

activities.title: Ghandruk Village Cultural Walk
activities.description: Largest Gurung village in Nepal — cobblestone lanes, traditional stone houses, and panoramic valley views.

activities.title: Final Sunrise View of Annapurna South from Ghandruk
activities.description: One last look at the clearest Annapurna South view from the village terrace before descending.

activities.title: Hot Shower and Laundry at Lakeside Guesthouse
activities.description: First hot shower in four days — hand your trekking clothes for same-day laundry service.

activities.title: Free Sarangkot Hike at Dawn
activities.description: Walk up the forest trail instead of taking a jeep — 1.5 hours, completely free, and more rewarding than the paid ride.

activities.title: Free Visit to Tal Barahi Island Temple
activities.description: Row to the island temple in the middle of Phewa Lake — free entry, spiritual atmosphere, no crowds midday.

activities.title: Budget Momo Lunch at Street Stall
activities.description: 10 steamed buffalo momos for NPR 120 at the local stalls near the lake ferry ghat.

activities.title: Night Market Browse and Budget Chow Mein Dinner
activities.description: Evening walk through the night market and NPR 180 chow mein from a local dhaba.

activities.title: Gupteshwor Cave — Roaring Underground River in Monsoon
activities.description: The underground river is at its loudest and most dramatic during monsoon — a completely different experience from dry season.

activities.title: Mahendra Cave Bat Colony Exploration
activities.description: Limestone cave with impressive stalactites, columns, and a large resident bat colony that swoops at dusk.

activities.title: Lakeside Check-In and Kids' First Himalayan View
activities.description: Settle into your hotel and walk to the lakefront — kids see the Annapurna range for the first time across Phewa Lake.

activities.title: Lakeside Souvenir and Handicraft Shopping
activities.description: Browse the lakeside market for handmade woolens, thangkas, and Gurung handicrafts — great for keeping kids engaged.

activities.title: Annapurna Panorama Sunrise at Sarangkot
activities.description: Shared jeep ride up before dawn — children are awed by the sheer scale of Dhaulagiri, Annapurna, and Machhapuchhre.

activities.title: Pokhara Regional Museum — Valley Culture and History
activities.description: Compact museum with exhibits on Gandaki province — old farm tools, costumes, and local history that provide context for the trip.

activities.title: Champagne Cocktails at Fishtail Lodge Bar
activities.description: Pre-dinner drinks at Pokhara's most exclusive island lodge — accessible only by rope-pulled raft ferry.

activities.title: Family Dal Bhat Night at Local Thakali Restaurant
activities.description: Authentic Thakali dal bhat set — rice, lentils, saag, achaar, and papad — a proper Nepali meal together.

activities.title: Blue Hour at Phewa Shoreline
activities.description: Shoot 20 minutes before sunrise — dead-calm water mirrors the pre-dawn sky perfectly.

activities.title: Lakeside Night Market Dinner — Street Food Round
activities.description: Sample momos, sekuwa, and fresh fruit stalls from the evening night market — great for adventurous eaters.

activities.title: Morning Drive and Family Canoe at Begnas Lake
activities.description: A 30-minute drive from the city leads to Pokhara's most peaceful lake — hire canoes or rowboats for a quiet morning on the water.

activities.title: Final Family Lunch at Pokhara Thakali Kitchen
activities.description: Last Nepali meal together — Thakali set with unlimited rice, three types of dal, and mustard greens.

activities.title: Pre-Flight Breakfast and Briefing at Sarangkot
activities.description: Hot breakfast at the viewpoint stalls, then meet your pilot for the weight check and safety briefing.

activities.title: Adrenaline Recovery Lakeside Lunch
activities.description: Celebrate the flight with a full meal on the lake terrace — review your GoPro footage over pasta and cold Carlsberg.

activities.title: Busy Bee Cafe Night Beer and Live Music
activities.description: Pokhara's top bar for live Nepali rock music — Everest beer, sekuwa skewers, and fellow adventure travellers.

activities.title: Half-Day White-Water Rafting on Seti River
activities.description: Grade 2–3 rapids through narrow gorge sections — perfect for first-timers, with a guide, helmet, and lifejacket included.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Sunset View — Best in Pokhara
activities.description: The definitive Pokhara sunset location — Phewa Lake, city, and Annapurna all in one frame from the stupa platform.

activities.title: Luxury Check-In at Temple Tree Resort Lakeside
activities.description: Pokhara's finest lakefront resort — garden cottages, private pool, and direct lake access set the tone for the honeymoon.
activities.location: Temple Tree Resort and Spa Pokhara

activities.title: Valentine's Candlelit Dinner at Temple Tree Resort
activities.description: Specially arranged outdoor lakefront candlelit dinner — private table, set menu, and live classical guitar.
activities.location: Temple Tree Resort and Spa Pokhara

activities.title: Lakeside Lunch at Byanjan Restaurant
activities.description: Elegant multi-cuisine restaurant near the lake — celebrate the flight with seafood pasta and Pokhara's best tiramisu.

activities.title: Couples Ayurvedic Massage at Fishtail Lodge
activities.description: Private Ayurvedic treatment in the most exclusive setting in Pokhara — rope-ferry access, garden pavilions, and complete seclusion.

activities.title: Luxury Breakfast in Bed at Temple Tree Resort
activities.description: Return for a full continental breakfast served in the cottage — fresh pastries, Nepali honey, and masala chai.
activities.location: Temple Tree Resort and Spa Pokhara

activities.title: Lakeside Picnic Lunch at Begnas Shore
activities.description: Packed lunch from the resort eaten on the quiet lakeshore — cheese, crackers, fruit, and local achaar pickle.

activities.title: Sunset Cocktails on the Lake Terrace
activities.description: Watch the Annapurna alpenglow from the resort lakeside terrace with signature cocktails — gin and tonic with fresh lime.
activities.location: Temple Tree Resort and Spa Pokhara

activities.title: Luxury Souvenir Shopping at Lakeside Boutiques
activities.description: High-quality pashmina shawls, silver jewellery, and handmade paper gifts from the curated boutiques near Temple Tree.

activities.title: Tourist Bus Arrival from Kathmandu
activities.description: 6-hour scenic journey through the hills — grab a window seat on the right for mountain views.

activities.title: Golden Hour Reflections at Phewa Lake
activities.description: Position at the ghats as the sun dips — Annapurna mirrored on the still water at dusk.

activities.title: Dal Bhat Breakfast at Sarangkot Teahouse
activities.description: Simple teahouse meal with Annapurna views — fuel up before the midday lake session.

activities.title: Evening Backlit Portraits in Kaskikot Village
activities.description: Return at 4pm for warm backlit portraits of villagers returning from the terraced fields.

activities.title: Afternoon Overcast Macro Shots at the Shoreline
activities.description: Flat light is perfect for macro — shoot reeds, boat textures, and water droplets.

activities.title: Gupteshwor Cave Interior Light Study
activities.description: Underground cave beneath Davis Falls — dramatic stalactite formations lit by natural shafts.

activities.title: Bindabasini Temple Market Street Photography
activities.description: Busy local market temple — devotees, flower sellers, and pigeons in the noon bustle.

activities.title: Morning Mist Session at Phewa Shoreline
activities.description: October mornings bring light mist — shoot misty lake silhouettes with long lens.

activities.title: Rowboat Crossing to World Peace Stupa
activities.description: 20-minute boat ride across the lake — shoot Annapurna dead ahead the entire crossing.

activities.title: Night Photography on Lakeside Promenade
activities.description: Long exposure neon reflections on the lake — 10 to 30-second exposures on a tripod.

activities.title: Breakfast and Final Portfolio Edit at Lakeside
activities.description: Final cull session over breakfast — select 20 hero shots from the week's work.

activities.title: Tourist Bus Arrival from Kathmandu
activities.description: 6-hour bus from Kathmandu — use the journey for mindful observation of the hill scenery.

activities.title: Sattvic Welcome Dinner at Retreat
activities.description: Light vegetarian meal to ease into the retreat — lentil soup, fresh roti, and herbal tea.

activities.title: Post-Yoga Herbal Tea and Pranayama
activities.description: Wind down with chamomile tea and guided breathing exercises — 45 minutes with the instructor.

activities.title: Dawn Boat to World Peace Stupa for Meditation
activities.description: Cross the lake by rowboat at dawn — guided sitting meditation with a visiting Tibetan monk.

activities.title: Sattvic Breakfast Back at Retreat
activities.description: Fruit porridge with honey and herbal tea — prepared fresh by the retreat kitchen.

activities.title: Tibetan Singing Bowl Sound Bath
activities.description: 45-minute sound healing session — resonant bowls tuned to seven chakra frequencies.

activities.title: Morning Sarangkot Ridge Hike
activities.description: 3-hour ridge trail with 180-degree valley views — clear September air, near zero crowds.

activities.title: Nepali Cooking Class with Local Family
activities.description: Learn dal bhat, sel roti, and buff momos — cook a full meal and eat it together.

activities.title: Final Sunrise Meditation at Phewa Shore
activities.description: Sit silently by the water as the sun rises over the eastern hills — last retreat morning.

activities.title: Tibetan Thangka Gallery Browse and Purchase
activities.description: Pick up a hand-painted Tibetan thangka — a meaningful memento of the retreat.

activities.title: Local Bus Ride to Bhaktapur
activities.description: NPR 50 from Kathmandu city bus park — authentic local experience.

activities.title: Juju Dhau King Curd Lunch
activities.description: The most famous dairy product in Nepal — clay pot yoghurt from Bhaktapur.

activities.title: Potter's Square and Clay Spinning
activities.description: Watch traditional potters at the wheel — same technique for 1500 years.

activities.title: Tihar Festival Lamps at Bhaktapur Durbar Square
activities.description: The entire square is strung with thousands of oil lamps during Tihar — arrive at opening.

activities.title: Tihar Lamp Lighting at Taumadhi Square
activities.description: Join locals lighting hundreds of oil lamps around Nyatapola Temple at dusk.

activities.title: Bara and Juju Dhau Newari Breakfast
activities.description: Crispy lentil patties and king curd — the quintessential Bhaktapur breakfast.

activities.title: Bara and Chiya at Local Newari Stall
activities.description: Crispy lentil patties with eggs and butter tea — authentic Newari start.

activities.title: Chatpate and Pani Puri at Pottery Square
activities.description: Street snacks while watching the potters — the Bhaktapur way.

activities.title: Morning Prayer Rituals at Taumadhi Square
activities.description: Elderly Newaris perform puja before the tourists arrive — light incense smoke, ringing bells, and intimate human moments make for powerful documentary photography.

activities.title: Potters at Work — Mid-Morning Light at Pottery Square
activities.description: Potters throw clay on foot-powered wheels in soft diffused light — shoot at f/2.8 to blur the spinning clay and separate the subject from the cluttered background.

activities.title: Juju Dhau Fuel Stop and Nyatapola Guardian Staircase Shots
activities.description: Refuel with king curd in a clay pot, then position at street level on the Nyatapola staircase — five pairs of stone guardian statues create perfect symmetrical leading lines up the pagoda.

activities.title: Pashupatinath at Dawn — Sacred Fire and River Rituals
activities.description: Arrive at 6 AM to witness priests perform the Shiva abhishek as cremation fires are lit on the Bagmati ghats — the most spiritually charged dawn in Nepal.

activities.title: Morning Kora at Boudhanath — Spinning 108 Prayer Wheels
activities.description: Join Tibetan pilgrims on the great circumambulation path — spin each of the 108 prayer wheels while breathing sandalwood incense rising from a hundred butter lamps.

activities.title: Boudhanath Evening Kora and Butter Lamp Offering at Dusk
activities.description: Return as the stupa is lit gold at sunset — the circumambulation crowd grows as local Tibetans and monks join the evening kora; light a butter lamp offering in one of the small niches.

activities.title: Classical Art at Patan Museum — Nepal's Finest Collection
activities.description: Housed in a beautifully restored Malla palace — bronze statues, stone carvings, and Himalayan ceremonial art displayed to museum-standard in sunlit galleries.

activities.title: Lunch at the Award-Winning Patan Museum Cafe Courtyard
activities.description: Nepal's most beautiful cafe — filter coffee and light mezze plates among ancient carved stone columns inside the museum complex.

activities.title: Local Bus Ride to Bhaktapur at First Light
activities.description: NPR 50 city bus from Kathmandu — an authentic local experience that drops you right at the edge of the medieval city before most tour groups arrive.

activities.title: Juju Dhau King Curd and Bara Lunch at Taumadhi
activities.description: World-famous Bhaktapur yoghurt in an unglazed clay pot paired with crispy lentil bara patties — the quintessential Bhaktapur midday fuel stop eaten in the shadow of Nyatapola.

activities.title: Nyatapola Temple and Peacock Window in Golden Hour Light
activities.description: Return to Taumadhi as the 4:30 PM light warms the five-storey pagoda to amber — then walk to the Peacock Window, Nepal's finest woodcarving, at its most photogenic moment.

activities.title: Farm-Fresh Breakfast at Nagarkot Terrace with Himalayan Views
activities.description: Freshly laid eggs, honey-drizzled toast, and strong filter coffee on a hilltop terrace while the full Himalayan range remains visible across the valley.

activities.title: Changu Narayan Temple — 7th-Century Vishnu Carvings and Stone Inscriptions
activities.description: Nepal's oldest UNESCO site — the 7th-century Vishnu sculptures and the oldest stone inscription in the valley are explained by a knowledgeable local guide.

activities.title: Return to Kathmandu by Shared Jeep Through Eastern Valley
activities.description: Shared jeep back to Kathmandu — 30–40 minutes through terraced farmland and small Newari villages in the eastern valley.

activities.title: Thamel Arrival Evening Exploration — Bookshops and Cafes
activities.description: Explore the tourist hub of Nepal — browse second-hand bookshops stacked with Himalayan titles, outdoor gear stores, and colourful handicraft stalls.

activities.title: Welcome Dal Bhat Dinner at Thakali Kitchen Thamel
activities.description: Authentic Thakali set — dal bhat with multiple curries, gundruk soup, pickles, and unlimited refills to fuel the days ahead.

activities.title: Boudhanath Morning Circumambulation with Butter Lamps
activities.description: Walk the kora with Tibetan pilgrims as the morning butter lamps are lit — spin prayer wheels, breathe sandalwood incense, and take in the scale of one of the world's largest stupas.

activities.title: Tibetan Thenthuk Noodle Soup Lunch near Boudha
activities.description: Hearty handmade noodle soup with butter tea in a simple Tibetan restaurant steps from the stupa perimeter.

activities.title: Swayambhunath Sunrise — Monkey Temple Valley Panorama
activities.description: Climb the 365 steps before 7 AM — resident monkeys groom in the dawn light as the golden spire catches first sun and the Kathmandu Valley spreads below.

activities.title: Kathmandu Durbar Square Royal Palace Walk
activities.description: Explore Hanuman Dhoka Palace, the Living Goddess Kumari Ghar courtyard, and Taleju Temple — the royal heart of old Kathmandu.

activities.title: Dinner at Patan Museum Cafe Courtyard
activities.description: The most beautiful cafe courtyard in Nepal — dal soup, hummus, and Newari snacks among ancient carved stone columns as the square empties of tourists.

activities.title: Tourist Bus to Pokhara — Scenic Hill Drive
activities.description: 6-7 hour scenic drive through the Trisuli gorge and mid-hills — sit on the right side for the best river views.

activities.title: Lakeside Night Market Family Dinner Round Two
activities.description: Explore the night market for momos, fresh corn, and dessert stalls — the kids pick their last Pokhara street food.

activities.title: Phewa Lakeside Promenade Evening Stroll
activities.description: Stroll the lit promenade as paragliders make their final landings of the day — souvenir stalls, massage parlours, and live music spill out from every cafe.

activities.title: Dakshinkali Temple Ritual Visit
activities.description: Remote forest temple of the goddess Kali at the confluence of two rivers — witness ancient animal sacrifice rituals on auspicious days.

activities.title: 30-Minute Tandem Paragliding Flight over Phewa Lake
activities.description: Nepal's most popular adventure activity — 30-minute soaring flight from Sarangkot, riding thermals above Phewa Lake with the full Annapurna range behind you.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Forest Trail Hike at Golden Hour
activities.description: 45-minute uphill forest hike from the lake's southern shore — the white stupa sits at 1100m with 360° views of Phewa Lake, the valley, and the Annapurna range.

activities.title: Lakeside Breakfast at Fresh Fruit and Toast Stall
activities.description: Local breakfast stall by the lake — fresh papaya, banana pancakes, and masala chai for NPR 200 overlooking the water.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Sunset Panorama — Best View in Pokhara
activities.description: The definitive Pokhara closing shot — Phewa Lake, the city, and the full Annapurna silhouette in one frame as the sun drops behind the western hills.

activities.title: Peaceful Final Morning Canoe at Begnas Lake
activities.description: 30-minute drive east to Nepal's second largest lake — hire a canoe or rowboat for a quiet morning on the water with no tourists and just local fishermen for company.

activities.title: Fresh Trout Lunch at Begnas Lake Village Restaurant
activities.description: Whole freshwater trout grilled with mustard and served with rice at the small restaurant by the dam — possibly the freshest fish in Nepal.

activities.title: Private Transfer from Tribhuvan Airport to Thamel
activities.description: Pre-arranged private taxi from arrivals to the family hotel in Thamel — 30 minutes, NPR 700.

activities.title: Garden of Dreams Family Twilight Walk
activities.description: Neoclassical garden of Kaiser Mahal — lit fountains and bougainvillea pavilions give children their first introduction to Kathmandu's softer side.

activities.title: Welcome Family Dal Bhat Dinner at Thakali Kitchen
activities.description: Authentic Thakali set with multiple curries, gundruk soup, and unlimited refills — the first proper Nepali meal to fuel a 10-day adventure.

activities.title: Tibetan Momos and Butter Tea Lunch near Boudha
activities.description: Steamed Tibetan buff momos with chilli sauce and butter tea at a popular restaurant beside the stupa — filling and authentic.

activities.title: Kopan Monastery Garden Walk and Prayer Hall Visit
activities.description: Uphill walk north of Boudha — explore the terraced monastery gardens with valley views and enter the main prayer hall during afternoon prayers.

activities.title: Family Breakfast at Himalayan Java Coffee Thamel
activities.description: Nepal's best espresso chain — kids' hot chocolate, freshly baked pastries, and strong flat whites before heading to Patan.

activities.title: Patan Durbar Square Full Guided Heritage Tour
activities.description: Finest Newari architecture in the world — Krishna Mandir, Vishwanath Temple, and the Malla palace facades with a guide who brings the history alive for all ages.

activities.title: Family Dinner at Thamel House Restaurant
activities.description: Restored Newari townhouse with the best multi-course Nepali set menu in Thamel — rooftop terrace, cultural atmosphere, and a menu the whole family can enjoy.

activities.title: Bhaktapur Medieval City Tour — All Three Historic Squares
activities.description: Full guided walk through Durbar, Taumadhi, and Dattatreya squares — the 55-Window Palace, Nyatapola Temple, and the Peacock Window in the best-preserved medieval city in Asia.

activities.title: Juju Dhau King Curd Family Treat at Taumadhi
activities.description: World-famous Bhaktapur yoghurt in clay pots — slightly sour, perfectly set, and universally loved even by children.

activities.title: Dattatreya Square and Peacock Window Photography Walk
activities.description: Nepal's oldest temple square and the finest woodcarving in Nepal — the 500-year-old Peacock Window carved from a single wooden panel.

activities.title: Farm-Fresh Breakfast at Nagarkot Hilltop Terrace
activities.description: Freshly laid eggs, honey toast, and filter coffee on a terrace with the Himalayan range still sharp in the morning air.

activities.title: Thamel Street Food Evening Tour
activities.description: End the circuit with a self-guided street food crawl — chatpate, sekuwa, buff momo, and warm lapsi candy from Thamel's evening vendors.

activities.title: Tourist Bus to Pokhara — Scenic Trisuli Gorge Drive
activities.description: 6-hour journey through the Trisuli River gorge and mid-hills — sit on the right side for best river and mountain views.

activities.title: Pokhara Lakeside Check-In and First Himalayan View
activities.description: Check into the mid-range Lakeside hotel and walk straight to the lakeshore — the first view of Machhapuchhre and Annapurna reflected in Phewa Lake is genuinely breathtaking.

activities.title: First Pokhara Family Dinner at Roadhouse Cafe
activities.description: Pokhara's most reliable family restaurant — pizza, pasta, momos, and dal bhat all on one menu with a relaxed lakeside vibe.

activities.title: Sarangkot Village Warm Breakfast After Sunrise
activities.description: Hot omelettes, fresh roti, and sweet milk tea from the village teahouses — warmth and calories before the active day ahead.

activities.title: Celebration Lunch on Phewa Lakeside Terrace
activities.description: Celebrate the flight with a full family lunch on the lake terrace — review GoPro footage over pasta, momos, and cold Everest beer.

activities.title: Lakeside Night Market Family Dinner — Momos and Sekuwa
activities.description: Evening stroll through the night market sampling momos, sekuwa, and fresh fruit stalls from the street vendors.

activities.title: Lakeside Breakfast at Moondance Restaurant Terrace
activities.description: Fuel up for the day — egg breakfast, fresh juices, and coffee on the lake-view terrace as paragliders begin launching from Sarangkot above.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Island Temple Family Boat Crossing
activities.description: Row to the island Barahi Devi shrine — children love the crossing and the temple bells echoing across the water.

activities.title: International Mountain Museum — Himalayan Expedition History
activities.description: Life-sized expedition models, summit footage, and real climbing gear — older children love the Tenzing Norgay and Edmund Hillary section.

activities.title: Family Canoe Paddle and Lake Shore Picnic
activities.description: Hire canoes for the family and explore the quiet shoreline — spread out on the grass for a final lakeside moment before the city.

activities.title: Final Souvenir Shopping at Lakeside Market
activities.description: Last chance for prayer flags, thangka prints, and handmade Dhaka fabric for the family — let each child choose one final Nepal memento.

activities.title: Thamel Hostel Dorm Check-In — Zostel or Alobar1000
activities.description: Find a dorm bed for NPR 400–600/night at Zostel or Alobar1000 — both are social backpacker hubs with rooftop terraces and free wifi.

activities.title: Budget Street Food Dinner at Thamel Chowk Stalls
activities.description: Roadside stalls near Thamel Chowk — 10-piece steam momos for NPR 120, grilled buff sekuwa skewers for NPR 150, and fresh lime soda for NPR 50.

activities.title: Budget Breakfast at Pumpernickel Bakery Thamel
activities.description: Thamel institution — rye bread, croissants, and filter coffee for NPR 250, the best budget breakfast in the tourist district.

activities.title: NPR 200 Unlimited Street Dal Bhat Lunch at Asan Bazaar
activities.description: Unlimited dal bhat from a small family-run bhojnalaya near the seven-temple intersection — the most authentic cheap lunch in Kathmandu.

activities.title: Budget Street Momo Dinner at Thamel Chowk
activities.description: End the day with steam momos and chiya at the roadside stalls — NPR 300 for a full dinner that keeps the daily budget under NPR 2500.

activities.title: Sunset Sailing on Phewa Lake with Private Captain
activities.description: One-hour private sailboat as the Annapurna range turns gold and pink — champagne on board.

activities.title: NPR 200 Unlimited Dal Bhat Lunch near Boudhanath
activities.description: Eat where the monks eat — simple benches, unlimited refills, and a generous serving of achar at a basic local restaurant near the stupa perimeter.

activities.title: Local Bus to Bhaktapur — NPR 50 Authentic Transport
activities.description: Cheapest way to Bhaktapur — city bus from Ratna Park for NPR 50, an authentic local experience that takes about an hour.

activities.title: Juju Dhau King Curd at Taumadhi Square
activities.description: Nepal's most famous yoghurt — served in an unglazed clay pot in the shadow of the five-storey Nyatapola Temple.

activities.title: Local Bus Return to Kathmandu at Dusk
activities.description: Local bus back to Kathmandu for NPR 50 — arrive in Thamel by 6:30 PM in time for a cheap dinner.

activities.title: Patan Museum Classical Art Browse
activities.description: Nepal's finest art museum with a discounted student rate available — bronze deities, stone carvings, and Himalayan ceremonial objects.

activities.title: Mahabouddha Temple Hidden Alley Visit
activities.description: Medieval shikhara tower encrusted with 9000 Buddha images in a narrow alley — free to view from outside, an extraordinary piece of Buddhist architecture.

activities.title: Arrival Rest and Free Lakeside Promenade Walk
activities.description: Check into the hostel after the overnight bus and walk the entire Lakeside promenade — Phewa Lake stretches ahead and Annapurna fills the sky.

activities.title: Budget Momo Lunch at Lakeside Street Stall
activities.description: 10 steamed buffalo momos for NPR 120 from a local stall near the lake ferry ghat — the cheapest satisfying meal in Pokhara.

activities.title: Budget Street Food Dinner at Lakeside Evening Stalls
activities.description: Evening stroll along the promenade with sekuwa skewers and fresh sugarcane juice from the street stalls — full dinner under NPR 350.

activities.title: NPR 150 Roti and Tea Breakfast at Sarangkot Village Stall
activities.description: Local roti with butter and sweet milk tea from the village stalls — ultra-budget breakfast with the full Annapurna range as backdrop.

activities.title: Free Forest Trail Hike to World Peace Stupa — Second Visit
activities.description: 45-minute forest hike to the hilltop stupa — one of the best free activities in Pokhara, combining exercise, forest, and panoramic lake views.

activities.title: Budget Momo Lunch at Lakeside Street Stall
activities.description: 10 steam momos for NPR 120 and a Coke — quick fuel before the afternoon's sightseeing.

activities.title: Private Candlelit Dinner at 1905 Restaurant
activities.description: Intimate Nepali fusion tasting menu in a candlelit Rana-era dining room — wine pairing available.

activities.title: Seti River Gorge Milky White Water View from Bridge
activities.description: Lean over the bridge railing to watch the milky white Seti carve through an impossibly narrow gorge — totally free and surprisingly dramatic.

activities.title: Local Bus to Begnas Lake — NPR 50 Scenic Ride
activities.description: NPR 50 local bus east of Pokhara to the serene Begnas Lake — no tourists, just fishing boats, locals bathing, and the Annapurna backdrop.

activities.title: Simple Dal Bhat at Begnas Lake Village Restaurant
activities.description: Eat at the small local restaurant by the dam — freshwater fish curry and dal bhat for NPR 250, eaten at a lakeside bench.

activities.title: Budget Street Dinner at Lakeside Night Stalls
activities.description: Back at Lakeside for the last Pokhara dinner — sekuwa skewers, fried noodles, and a cold Coke from the promenade stalls under NPR 250.

activities.title: Street Breakfast — Sel Roti and Masala Chiya
activities.description: Hot sel roti and sweet masala chiya from the morning street cart by the bus park — NPR 100 and the last taste of Pokhara.

activities.title: Fast-Track VIP Arrival at Tribhuvan Airport
activities.description: Private transfer, fast-track immigration, and luxury vehicle to Dwarika's Hotel.

activities.title: Sunset Cocktails at Dwarika's Rooftop Lounge
activities.description: Craft cocktails on the private rooftop while watching Kathmandu's skyline glow orange.

activities.title: Hands-On Pottery Workshop at Potters' Square
activities.description: Private lesson with a master Prajapati potter — throw your own Nepali water pot on a traditional wheel.

activities.title: Fine Dining at The Pavilion Restaurant, Dwarika's
activities.description: Seasonal Nepali tasting menu using heritage grains and heirloom vegetables from partner farms.

activities.title: Lunch at Bhojan Griha Heritage Restaurant
activities.description: Traditional Nepali set meal served in a restored 150-year-old Rana mansion with classical music.

activities.title: Patan Museum — Nepal's Finest Bronze and Stone Art
activities.description: Award-winning museum housed inside the old royal palace — finest collection of Newar metalwork and Hindu iconography.

activities.title: Afternoon Tea & Lodge Check-In at Tiger Mountain
activities.description: Complimentary Himalayan tea and cake on the private terrace with sweeping Annapurna views.

activities.title: Welcome Dinner at Tiger Mountain Lodge
activities.description: Farm-to-table Nepali dinner at Nepal's most iconic eco-lodge — Annapurna Range illuminated at dusk.

activities.title: Himalayan Breakfast at Fishtail Lodge
activities.description: Lakeside luxury breakfast buffet on the island lodge terrace — Machhapuchhre reflected in calm morning water.

activities.title: Private Dinner at Moondance Restaurant Lakeside
activities.description: Lakeside fine dining with live acoustic music, fresh trout, and cocktails under a clear Himalayan sky.

activities.title: Full-Day Private Boat on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Dedicated private wooden boat with captain, packed gourmet picnic, and snorkeling gear — all day on the water.

activities.title: Begnas Lake Morning Walk & Himalayan Reflections
activities.description: Tranquil early walk around Pokhara's second lake — mirror-clear water with Annapurna IV and Lamjung Himal reflected.

activities.title: Davis Falls Photography Session with Guide
activities.description: The powerful subterranean waterfall that vanishes underground — best light and angles with a guide.

activities.title: Private Sunset Meditation at World Peace Stupa
activities.description: Private guide and meditation session at the white stupa — 360° Himalayan panorama as the sun sets over Pokhara.

activities.title: Steaming Chiya and Sel Roti Breakfast at Chabahil
activities.description: Local tea and crispy sel roti at a streetside stall near the temple — fuel up the way pilgrims have for centuries.

activities.title: Explore Birthplace of Buddha
activities.description: Visit the revered Mayadevi Temple, the exact spot where Prince Siddhartha Gautama (Buddha) was born, and explore the ancient Ashoka Pillar and the sacred Bodhi tree.

activities.title: Dal Bhat Lunch at Himalayan Java Café, Boudha
activities.description: Affordable dal bhat or pasta at the popular Boudha branch — shaded courtyard seating with stupa views.

activities.title: Changu Narayan Temple — Nepal's Oldest Vishnu Shrine
activities.description: UNESCO-listed hilltop temple with Nepal's oldest stone inscription from 464 CE — intricate Licchavi-era carvings and serene village setting.

activities.title: Dakshinkali Temple Ritual Visit
activities.description: Remote forest temple of the goddess Kali at the confluence of two rivers — witness ancient animal sacrifice rituals on auspicious days.

activities.title: Budhanilkantha Sleeping Vishnu — Cosmic Reclining Statue
activities.description: A 1,500-year-old stone Vishnu reclining on a thousand-headed serpent in a water tank — one of Nepal's most remarkable outdoor sculptures.

activities.title: Morning Coffee at Thamel Boutique Art Café
activities.description: Start with specialty Nepali coffee and homemade pastry in a peaceful garden setting before the city wakes up.

activities.title: Patan Durbar Square Craft Workshop Visit
activities.description: Visit active metalwork and stone-carving workshops around Patan's living museum — artisans welcome visitors to watch traditional techniques.

activities.title: Winter Fog Morning at Pashupatinath Ghats
activities.description: The winter fog gives Pashupatinath an ethereal, mystical quality — watch the first pilgrims arrive for morning puja in near silence.

activities.title: Affordable Momo Lunch at New Everest Momo Centre
activities.description: Kathmandu's most beloved momo shop — steamed or fried buff momo with achaar and broth for a warming winter lunch.

activities.title: Nagarjun Hill Forest Sunset Walk
activities.description: Easy walk into the pine forest on the valley rim — rewarded with a winter sunset over the city and a rare chance for total quiet.

activities.title: Thakali Breakfast at Local Dhaba Near Thamel
activities.description: Warming Thakali breakfast of mustard greens, buckwheat roti, and hot butter tea — the perfect fuel for a winter walk.

activities.title: Freak Street Old Hippie Quarter Afternoon Stroll
activities.description: The 1970s hippie trail still lives on Jochhe (Freak Street) — budget lodges, old-school pie shops, and a distinctly retro Kathmandu atmosphere.

activities.title: Pre-Trek Breakfast at Lakeside Bakery Café
activities.description: Load up on porridge, eggs, and fresh bread at Lakeside before the early bus — pack a lunch sandwich from the bakery counter.

activities.title: Nayapul to Tikhedhunga Trail — First Steps into the Annapurna
activities.description: The Annapurna Sanctuary trail begins here — easy riverside walk through Modi Khola gorge with suspension bridges and terraced fields.

activities.title: Tea House Dal Bhat Dinner at Ulleri
activities.description: Arrive exhausted but rewarded — hot Nepali dal bhat with unlimited refills at a family-run tea house, with mountain views emerging above the forest.

activities.title: Morning Heritage Walk at Kathmandu Durbar Square
activities.description: Explore the royal palace, Kumari house, and Taleju Temple at the heart of old Kathmandu.

activities.title: Asan Bazaar Morning Snack Walk
activities.description: Weave through the seven-temple intersection buying pani puri and chatpate from street vendors — the most atmospheric market in old Kathmandu.

activities.title: Lunch at Local Thakali Kitchen
activities.description: Authentic Thakali set meal — dal bhat with multiple curries, gundruk soup, and unlimited refills.

activities.title: Golden Hour at Swayambhunath
activities.description: Climb the 365 steps for panoramic valley views and watch the evening light turn the golden spire amber.

activities.title: Dawn Kora at Boudhanath Stupa
activities.description: Walk the circumambulation path with monks as butter lamps are lit at sunrise — one of the most peaceful experiences in Nepal.

activities.title: Afternoon Tea and Rest at Ghorepani Lodge
activities.description: Warm up with butter tea and apple pie at the lodge — rest your legs and plan your Poon Hill strategy with other trekkers.

activities.title: Nepali Dal Bhat Dinner at Tea House
activities.description: Refuel with unlimited dal bhat before the early morning Poon Hill summit — the tea house fills with excited trekkers planning the 4 AM alarm.

activities.title: Post-Summit Breakfast Back at Ghorepani Lodge
activities.description: Return to Ghorepani for a well-earned hot breakfast after the summit — pancakes, eggs, and strong Nepali milk tea.

activities.title: Celebration Dal Bhat at Nayapul Local Teahouse
activities.description: Collapse into a plastic chair and eat two rounds of dal bhat — you've earned it after 45+ km of trekking.

activities.title: Momos Breakfast at OR2K Cafe
activities.description: Famous vegetarian cafe steps from Boudhanath — try the buff momo and a warming cup of ginger tea.

activities.title: Cheap Dal Bhat Lunch near Boudhanath
activities.description: Eat where the monks eat — unlimited dal bhat for NPR 200 at a basic local restaurant just outside the stupa perimeter.

activities.title: Evening Bagmati Aarti Ceremony
activities.description: Stay for the aarti — priests light oil lamps and chant Sanskrit hymns as the sun sets over the sacred Bagmati River.

activities.title: Royal Palace Tour at Kathmandu Durbar Square
activities.description: Guided tour of Hanuman Dhoka Palace, Taleju Temple, and Kumari Ghar — the three great monuments of the old royal quarter.

activities.title: Street Food Crawl through Asan Bazaar
activities.description: Seven-temple intersection — try chatpate, pani puri, and sel roti from street stalls while watching the morning market bustle.

activities.title: Rani Pokhari Waterside Walk and Evening Tea
activities.description: Circle the historic Royal Pond at dusk — a calming stroll with golden light reflecting off the central Shiva temple.

activities.title: Breakfast at Cafe de Patan
activities.description: Freshly baked breads, filter coffee, and eggs in a quiet courtyard just steps from Patan Durbar Square.

activities.title: Mahendra Cave Bat Colony Exploration
activities.description: Limestone cave with impressive stalactites, columns, and a large resident bat colony that swoops at dusk.

activities.title: UNESCO Walk at Patan Durbar Square
activities.description: Finest concentration of Newari architecture — Krishna Mandir, Vishwanath Temple, and the restored palace facades.

activities.title: Coffee in the Award-Winning Patan Museum Cafe
activities.description: The most beautiful cafe courtyard in Nepal — fresh filter coffee among ancient carved stone pillars.

activities.title: Patan Durbar Square Evening Golden Hour
activities.description: Return at dusk when the warm light turns the ancient temples amber and the square empties of tourists.

activities.title: Sunrise Meditation at Swayambhunath
activities.description: Early morning when the stupa is peaceful — prayer flags snapping in the breeze, monks circumambulating, and resident monkeys grooming in the dawn light.

activities.title: Breakfast at Himalayan Java Coffee Thamel
activities.description: Nepal's best espresso chain — strong flat whites and freshly baked pastries to start the final day.

activities.title: Tibetan Lunch at Tsampa Restaurant Boudha
activities.description: Hearty Tibetan thenthuk noodle soup and butter tea at a simple restaurant run by Tibetan refugees.

activities.title: Kopan Monastery Garden and Meditation Walk
activities.description: A 30-minute uphill walk north of Boudha brings you to terraced monastery gardens with valley-wide views — peaceful and free.

activities.title: Newari Breakfast at Honacha
activities.description: Best Newari breakfast in the valley — lentil bara cakes, aloo tama curry, and spiced chiya to start the food trail.

activities.title: Thamel Momo Tour — Three Shops, Three Styles
activities.description: Methodically compare buff, chicken, and veg momos across three famous Thamel momo shops — steamed, fried, and jhol (soup) versions.

activities.title: Traditional Chiya Session at Old Kathmandu Teahouse
activities.description: A hole-in-the-wall tea shop near Asan Tole — NPR 20 masala chiya served in clay cups, the authentic Nepali tea ritual.

activities.title: Local Bhaat Lunch Before Departure
activities.description: Final meal — NPR 170 rice, dal, and vegetable tarkari at a neighbourhood dhaba near the bus park.

activities.title: Rooftop Dinner at Krishnarpan
activities.description: 22-course authentic Nepali tasting menu inside Dwarika's — Aarav's single greatest meal, once-in-a-lifetime experience.

activities.title: Asan Morning Market Snack Crawl
activities.description: Pani puri, chatpate, and freshly made sel roti at the morning market — the most photogenic street food in Kathmandu.

activities.title: Cooking Class at Cooking with Puskar
activities.description: Hands-on session making dal bhat from scratch, fermenting gundruk, and preparing aloo tama — full recipe pack included.

activities.title: Newari Dinner at Wunjala Moskva Kitchen
activities.description: Authentic Newari multi-course set served in a heritage courtyard — beaten rice, buffalo curry, and black soybean salad.

activities.title: Bus to Bhaktapur with Morning Sel Roti Snack
activities.description: Take the local bus from Ratna Park — NPR 30 — and grab hot sel roti and tea from a roadside stall at Banepa on the way.

activities.title: Samay Baji Plate at a Local Bhaktapur Restaurant
activities.description: A Newari ritual platter — beaten rice, black soybean, grilled buffalo meat, ginger, egg, and aila (local spirit) — the dish eaten at festivals.

activities.title: Newari Sweet Shop Crawl Near Taumadhi
activities.description: Sample lakhamari (elaborate sugar sculptures), jeri (fried sweet spirals), and sel roti from the rows of sweet shops around Taumadhi Square.

activities.title: Farewell Momo Dinner at Himalayan Momo Corner
activities.description: Back in Thamel — end the food trail with a final plate of jhol momo (soup dumplings) and a Kingfisher beer.

activities.title: Airport Transfer and Hotel Check-in at Thamel
activities.description: Private taxi from Tribhuvan Airport to a mid-range Thamel guesthouse — 30 minutes in normal traffic.

activities.title: Thamel Craft and Singing Bowl Browse
activities.description: Pick up a hand-hammered singing bowl, pashmina shawl, or thangka print — bargain gently and inspect quality.

activities.title: Garden of Dreams Twilight Stroll
activities.description: Neoclassical garden oasis of Kaiser Mahal — fountains, pavilions, and bougainvillea lit in the early evening.

activities.title: Morning Aarti at Pashupatinath
activities.description: Arrive at 6 AM to witness the sacred morning abhishek ritual on the Bagmati ghats — smoke, chanting, and orange marigolds.

activities.title: Circumambulation at Boudhanath Stupa
activities.description: Join pilgrims on the morning kora — spin prayer wheels, smell incense, and watch monks in saffron robes make offerings.

activities.title: Tibetan Thangka Gallery Walk in Boudha
activities.description: Browse the ring of Tibetan art galleries around the stupa — even without buying, the craftsmanship is extraordinary.

activities.title: Evening Tea at a Boudha Rooftop Cafe
activities.description: Finish the day on a rooftop terrace with butter tea and the stupa lit golden in the late afternoon.

activities.title: Pottery Square Live Wheel Demonstration
activities.description: Watch master potters throw large pots using foot-driven wheels — a living tradition unchanged for centuries.

activities.title: Nyatapola Temple and Bhairavnath Mandir Exploration
activities.description: Climb the grand staircase flanked by paired guardian statues — the tallest pagoda temple in Nepal at 30 metres.

activities.title: Return to Kathmandu by Shared Taxi
activities.description: Shared taxi back to Kathmandu city — NPR 100 per seat, 45 minutes through the eastern valley.

activities.title: Sunrise at Nagarkot Viewpoint
activities.description: Panoramic Himalayan sunrise — Everest, Langtang, and Annapurna all visible on a clear October morning.

activities.title: Changu Narayan Ridge Hike from Nagarkot
activities.description: 2.5-hour forest ridge walk descending to Nepal's oldest UNESCO temple — pass pine groves and traditional Newari villages.

activities.title: Souvenir Shopping — Stretching Budget
activities.description: Final browse for prayer flags, postcards, and local handicrafts — haggle hard and stay under NPR 300.

activities.title: Return to Kathmandu by Shared Jeep
activities.description: Shared jeep from Changu to Kathmandu — bumpy but scenic ride through the eastern valley.

activities.title: Peaceful Final Morning at Garden of Dreams
activities.description: Neoclassical garden with six pavilions — a quiet hour among fountains and flowering courtyards before the journey home.

activities.title: Final Visit to Swayambhunath for Valley Panorama
activities.description: Climb the 365 steps for a last panoramic view across the Kathmandu Valley — the perfect goodbye.

activities.title: Last Shopping at Thamel
activities.description: Pashmina shawls, thangka paintings, hand-hammered singing bowls, and trekking gear — pack carefully.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner at Bhojan Griha Dilli Bazaar
activities.description: Classical Nepali cuisine in a 150-year-old Rana-era mansion — cultural performances and a 20-dish sampler to close five perfect days.

activities.title: Private Limousine Transfer to Dwarika's Hotel
activities.description: A uniformed driver meets you at arrivals with a sign — air-conditioned luxury vehicle to the only five-star heritage hotel in Kathmandu.

activities.title: Heritage Cocktails at Dwarika's Lobby Bar
activities.description: Sip Nepali craft spirits — Khukri rum or Muktinath whisky — in the candlelit courtyard bar as the fountain plays and peacocks wander nearby.

activities.title: Himalayan Panorama Mountain Flight
activities.description: One-hour Buddha Air scenic flight at dawn — Everest, Kanchenjunga, Lhotse, Makalu, and the full Annapurna range visible from your window seat.

activities.title: Private Patan Durbar Square Art Walk
activities.description: Expert art historian leads a private 2-hour deep dive through Patan's royal quarter — every stone tells a story of the Malla dynasty.

activities.title: Exclusive Shopping at Dhukuti Craft Collective
activities.description: Nepal's most curated artisan shop — hand-woven dhaka textiles, Lokta paper goods, and ethically sourced Himalayan craft.

activities.title: Free Tibetan Gallery Browse around Boudha
activities.description: Circle the stupa and pop into the Tibetan art galleries — no obligation to buy, and the craftsmanship is extraordinary.

activities.title: Private Bhaktapur UNESCO Tour with Art Historian
activities.description: Exclusive half-day tour of all three squares with a certified art historian — intricate woodcarving, Malla bronzes, and living cultural rituals explained.

activities.title: Traditional Newari Feast at Peacock Restaurant
activities.description: Multi-course Newari set lunch in a restored courtyard — samay baji platter, buffalo curry, aloo achar, and Bhaktapur's famous yoghurt to finish.

activities.title: Private Chef's Table Dinner by the Heritage Courtyard
activities.description: An exclusive chef's table set in Dwarika's candlelit courtyard — eight bespoke courses prepared to dietary preferences, with wine pairings.

activities.title: Farewell Breakfast with Himalayan View at Dwarika's
activities.description: Last morning at the heritage hotel — slow breakfast of traditional Nepali bread, honey, fresh fruit, and strong coffee on the terrace.

activities.title: Final Heritage Garden Morning Walk at Dwarika's
activities.description: A quiet hour in the restored garden among carved stone pieces rescued from old Kathmandu buildings — a private museum in the grounds.

activities.title: Final Lunch at Third Eye Restaurant
activities.description: Long-running fine-dining institution in Thamel — excellent Tibetan and continental menu, rooftop terrace, unhurried service.

activities.title: Private Airport Transfer and Departure Lounge
activities.description: Chauffeur-driven departure with departure assistance — porter service and VIP check-in support to close the luxury escape.

activities.title: Morning Monks' Prayer Viewing at Swayambhu
activities.description: After sunrise monks gather in the small gompa beside the stupa — sit quietly at the back and watch the butter-lamp lighting ritual at no cost.

activities.title: Free Heritage Walking Tour from Thamel
activities.description: Several tip-based walking tours depart Thamel at 10 AM — 2-hour loop covering Durbar Square, Kumari Ghar, Asan, and Indra Chowk.

activities.title: Evening Street Momo and Sekuwa at Thamel Chowk
activities.description: End the day at the roadside stalls near Thamel Chowk — 10-piece steam momo for NPR 120 and skewers of grilled buff sekuwa for NPR 150.

activities.title: Free Garden Walk at Kopan Monastery
activities.description: Thirty minutes uphill from Boudha — the terraced monastery garden is open to respectful visitors and the view across the valley is superb.

activities.title: Bagmati Riverside Stroll at Sunset
activities.description: Walk the forested riverside path south of Pashupatinath — sadhus, evening bells, and the river glowing orange at dusk.

activities.title: Durbar Square Before the Crowds
activities.description: Arrive at 7 AM when the square is still and the temples glow in soft morning light — hawkers and tour groups arrive after 9.

activities.title: NPR 200 Dal Bhat Near Durbar Square
activities.description: A no-sign bhojnalaya tucked off the square — unlimited dal bhat with three vegetable sides for NPR 200, popular with rickshaw drivers.

activities.title: Thamel Second-Hand Book Browse and Evening Chai
activities.description: Thamel has some of the best second-hand bookshops in Asia — browse Himalayan trekking guides, novels, and maps for NPR 50–300 each.

activities.title: Farewell Momo and Chiya at a Budget Thamel Joint
activities.description: Close the trip with a final plate of steam momos and a clay-cup chiya — the most honest NPR 200 meal in the city.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn Shoot at Pashupatinath Cremation Ghats
activities.description: Arrive before 5:30 AM — river mist, oil-lamp reflections, and cremation fires create the most powerful photography in Nepal.

activities.title: Bagmati Riverside Light Study
activities.description: Walk the ghats north after the main shoot — backlit sadhus, pilgrims bathing, and forest-framed riverside temples at 8 AM.

activities.title: Asan Market Colour and Chaos Mid-Morning
activities.description: Seven-temple intersection with incredible compressed-perspective shots — stacked spice sacks, flower sellers, and devotees all in one frame.

activities.title: Old Kathmandu Lane Textures Walk
activities.description: The backstreets between Asan and Indra Chowk are packed with peeling walls, prayer flags, and everyday street life — every alley is a frame.

activities.title: Blue-to-Golden Hour at Swayambhunath Summit
activities.description: Arrive 20 minutes before sunrise — shoot the city and valley below in deep blue, then watch the stupa spire catch first gold light.

activities.title: Potters and Morning Light at Pottery Square Bhaktapur
activities.description: Potters work from 6 AM in stunning direct morning light — shoot at f/2.8 to separate spinning wheel from cluttered background.

activities.title: Peacock Window Detail and Dattatreya Square
activities.description: The 500-year-old Peacock Window is the finest woodcarving in Nepal — use a macro or telephoto lens on the feather detail; the square itself is less crowded than Durbar.

activities.title: Bhaktapur Durbar Square Warm Afternoon Light
activities.description: Return to the main square at 3–4 PM when the sun is low and warm — the 55-Window Palace facade glows amber and shadows cut deep across the stone.

activities.title: Natural History Museum Himalayan Wildlife Exhibits
activities.description: Just below the stupa — minerals, pressed butterflies, stuffed snow leopards, and Himalayan bird collections that children find fascinating.

activities.title: Thamel Toy and Souvenir Shop Crawl
activities.description: Let the kids choose a small singing bowl, yak wool toy, or thangka postcard — Thamel's craft shops are endlessly entertaining for curious children.

activities.title: Family Dinner at Roadhouse Cafe Thamel
activities.description: Pizza, pasta, burgers, and Nepali dishes all on one menu — Thamel's most reliable family restaurant with a relaxed vibe.

activities.title: Taxi Ride to Bhaktapur — Spotting the Valley
activities.description: 30-minute taxi east through the Kathmandu Valley — point out farms, temples, and the distant Himalayan snow line to the kids en route.

activities.title: Carb-Loading Pasta Dinner Before Trek
activities.description: Pasta and garlic bread to fuel the first hard trekking days — trekkers' tradition.

activities.title: Nyatapola Temple Step-Counting Challenge
activities.description: Race the kids up the 108 steps of Nepal's tallest pagoda temple — the paired guardian statues on each landing make it feel like a game.

activities.title: Bhaktapur Durbar Square and 55-Window Palace
activities.description: Walk through the main royal square — the 55-Window Palace is stunning and kids enjoy spotting different carved figures.

activities.title: Boudhanath Stupa Morning Family Walk
activities.description: Walk the great circumambulation path — spin every prayer wheel, count the butter lamps, and watch monks in maroon robes before the crowds arrive.

activities.title: Kite Flying at Tundikhel Open Ground
activities.description: Kathmandu's largest open ground — in winter locals fly kites and kids play cricket; buy a kite from nearby stalls for NPR 50.

activities.title: Last Souvenir Shopping at Thamel
activities.description: Final chance for pashminas, singing bowls, and thangka cards — let each child pick one thing to remember the trip.

activities.title: Tibetan Butter Tea and Silence at Boudha Teahouse
activities.description: Small Tibetan teahouse just off the circumambulation path — sit with butter tea, journal, and let the sound of monks chanting settle over you.

activities.title: Kopan Monastery Guided Garden and Prayer Hall Tour
activities.description: Tibetan Buddhist monastery on the hill north of Boudha — terraced gardens, large prayer hall with butter lamps, and a monk guide who welcomes questions.

activities.title: 2-Hour Guided Meditation at Himalayan Buddhist Centre
activities.description: Open-to-visitors session covering breath awareness and loving-kindness practice — no experience required, cushions and mats provided.

activities.title: Dawn Abhishek Rituals at Pashupatinath
activities.description: Arrive at 5:30 AM to watch priests bathe and dress the Shiva lingam — bells, conch shells, and orange marigolds at Nepal's most sacred Hindu site.

activities.title: Early Breakfast and Pack-Up
activities.description: Light breakfast and final gear check before the jeep departs at 7 AM sharp.

activities.title: Guheswari Shakti Temple Visit
activities.description: Sacred Shakti shrine beside the Bagmati River, just downstream from Pashupatinath — one of the Ashta Matrikas temples, powerful and rarely visited by outsiders.

activities.title: Jeep Back to Pokhara from Nayapul
activities.description: Shared jeep back from Nayapul — 1.5 hours, NPR 300 per seat — arrive by noon.

activities.title: Return and Vegetarian Dinner at Narayan Cafe Thamel
activities.description: Rooftop dining with glimpses of distant Himalayan peaks — vegetarian thali, dal soup, and fresh lime soda after a day of deep spiritual engagement.

activities.title: Sunrise Circumambulation at Swayambhunath with Monks
activities.description: Final morning — join resident monks in their dawn kora as butter lamps are lit and prayer wheels spin; the valley spread below is meditative.

activities.title: Garden of Dreams Meditative Morning Stroll
activities.description: Quiet neoclassical garden — walk slowly among the fountains and pavilions as a moving meditation before departing the city.

activities.title: Silent Farewell Lunch at Newa Chhon Restaurant
activities.description: Traditional Newari cuisine in a serene heritage courtyard — woah bara, aloo tama, and black-lentil soup eaten without hurry on the last afternoon.

activities.title: Bus Arrival at Pokhara Bus Park and Tuk-Tuk to Lakeside
activities.description: Greenline or public bus from Kathmandu arrives at Pokhara Bus Park — NPR 50 tuk-tuk to the Lakeside budget guesthouse strip.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Island Temple Rowboat Crossing
activities.description: Row across to the small island temple on Phewa Lake — the boat is included in the lake entry fee and the Barahi Devi shrine is beautiful.

activities.title: Phewa Lakeside Promenade Evening Walk
activities.description: Stroll the lit promenade as paragliders land on the hillside above — souvenir stalls, massage parlours, and live music spill out from every cafe.

activities.title: Lakeside Street Food Dinner — Sekuwa and Momo
activities.description: Grilled buff sekuwa skewers, jhol momo, and a fresh sugarcane juice from the street stalls along the lakeside promenade.

activities.title: Romantic Dinner at Fishtail Lodge Terrace
activities.description: Dinner on the private island property — candlelit terrace, lake reflections, and the Annapurna silhouette at night.

activities.title: Sarangkot Village Tea and Descent Walk
activities.description: After sunrise, take the 45-minute walking descent through Sarangkot village — buy chiya from a local home and enjoy the terraced hillside views.

activities.title: Forest Hike to World Peace Pagoda
activities.description: 45-minute uphill forest trail from the lake's southern shore — the white stupa sits at 1100m with 360° views of the lake, valley, and Annapurna.

activities.title: Lakeside Promenade Bicycle Ride at Dusk
activities.description: Rent a bicycle for NPR 150/hour and ride the flat Lakeside promenade north toward the Pumdi Bhumdi wetlands — perfect in the golden hour.

activities.title: Budget Breakfast at Lakeside Street Stall
activities.description: Hot sel roti, fried egg, and chiya from a morning street cart — NPR 100 for a complete breakfast eaten overlooking the lake.

activities.title: Gupteshwor Cave and Davis Falls Combined Ticket
activities.description: The underground Gupteshwor river cave thunders beneath Davis Falls — the combined ticket is NPR 400 and the cave is dramatic in spring snowmelt.

activities.title: Swim and Rest at Begnas Lake Shore
activities.description: The shallow southern shore is calm and clean — bring a towel and enjoy a free swim at one of Nepal's least-touristed lakes.

activities.title: TIMS and ACAP Permits at Tourism Office
activities.description: Get both permits before any trekking — TIMS NPR 2000, ACAP NPR 3000. Arrive early to beat the queue.

activities.title: Trail Map Study over Dal Bhat Lunch
activities.description: Review the Annapurna Circuit trail map and pack your bag over a hearty dal bhat.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Evening Stroll Before Big Trek
activities.description: Last relaxing walk before five days of trekking — soak in the lake views and calm your mind.

activities.title: Jeep Ride to Nayapul Trailhead
activities.description: Bumpy 1.5-hour shared jeep ride from Pokhara through Naudanda to the Annapurna trailhead.

activities.title: Nayapul to Birethanti Entry Checkpoint
activities.description: First official checkpoint — show your ACAP and TIMS permits before entering the conservation area.

activities.title: Ulleri Stone Steps Climb
activities.description: 2000+ stone steps — one of the steepest climbs on the Annapurna trail with valley views all the way up.

activities.title: Overnight Stay at Tikhedhunga Tea House
activities.description: Simple tea house at 1540m — hot shower, dal bhat dinner, and early sleep before a big climbing day.

activities.title: Banthanti Tea Break and Snack
activities.description: Mid-climb break at 2250m — energy bars, black tea, and clear views of the Annapurna South face.

activities.title: Epic Climb to Ghorepani — 2874m
activities.description: Final push through the world's largest rhododendron forest to the ridgeline village at 2874m.

activities.title: Sunset View from Ghorepani Ridge
activities.description: The full Dhaulagiri and Annapurna panorama at golden hour — a preview of tomorrow's Poon Hill sunrise.

activities.title: Poon Hill Sunrise — Nepal's Most Photographed View
activities.description: 4-AM headlamp hike to 3210m for the most iconic Himalayan sunrise in Nepal — eight peaks over 7000m in one frame.

activities.title: Post-Sunrise Tea at Poon Hill Summit Stall
activities.description: Hot ginger lemon tea from the summit stall while the sun climbs above the Annapurna massif.

activities.title: Ghorepani to Tadapani Trek through Oak Forest
activities.description: 3-hour trail through dense oak and rhododendron forest with continuing Annapurna South views.

activities.title: Overnight Dal Bhat at Ghandruk Homestay
activities.description: Stay in a Gurung homestay — family-cooked dal bhat and local raksi around the kitchen fire.

activities.title: Ghandruk to Nayapul Descent Trek
activities.description: 3-hour descent through forest and farmland back to the trailhead — knees earn their rest.

activities.title: Lakeside Recovery Walk and Souvenir Shopping
activities.description: Browse the Lakeside market for handicrafts, prayer flags, and thangka paintings as post-trek treats.

activities.title: Lakeside Recovery Dinner with Everest Beer
activities.description: Well-earned pizza, chips, and a cold Everest beer — celebrate completing the Poon Hill circuit.

activities.title: NPR 150 Roti and Tea at Sarangkot Stall
activities.description: Local roti with butter and sweet milk tea from the village stalls — the ultra-budget breakfast with the best view.

activities.title: Shared Rowboat at Phewa Lake with Backpackers
activities.description: Find other solo travellers at the boat ghat and split the cost — NPR 100 each versus NPR 400 alone.

activities.title: Unlimited Dal Bhat at Monsoon Mist Lakeside
activities.description: NPR 200 unlimited refill dal bhat while watching monsoon clouds roll dramatically over the Annapurnas.

activities.title: Free Lakeside Promenade Sunset Walk
activities.description: Evening stroll along the Phewa lakeshore promenade — street food stalls, live music from cafes, no cost.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Free Forest Trail Hike
activities.description: Hike up through dense monsoon forest — completely free, dramatically scenic, 45 minutes each way.
