activities.title: Stupa Panorama — Lake and Himalayas Together
activities.description: The best free vantage point in Pokhara — Phewa Lake, Annapurna range, and city all at once.

activities.title: Unlimited Dal Bhat — Monsoon Edition
activities.description: Second day dal bhat watching the lake — monsoon rain adds to the experience.

activities.title: Free Walk Along Seti River Gorge
activities.description: The milky white river carves through an impossibly narrow gorge — totally free to view from the bridge.

activities.title: Davis Falls Monsoon Thunderfall View
activities.description: The waterfall plunges into the cave below with full force — monsoon turns this into one of Nepal's most powerful waterfalls.

activities.title: Local Bhaat Lunch Before Departure
activities.description: Final meal — NPR 170 rice, dal, and vegetable tarkari at a neighbourhood dhaba near the bus park.

activities.title: Souvenir Shopping — Stretching Budget
activities.description: Final browse for prayer flags, postcards, and local handicrafts — haggle hard and stay under NPR 300.

activities.title: Family Rowboat and Paddle Boat on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Hire a rowboat or colourful paddle boat — younger kids love steering and the Annapurna reflection is magical in winter clarity.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Island Temple — Kids' Favourite Boat Crossing
activities.description: Short wooden boat ride to the island temple in the middle of the lake — children love the crossing and the temple bells.

activities.title: Family Dinner at Moondance Restaurant
activities.description: Pokhara's most family-friendly restaurant — pasta, pizza, momos, and dal bhat all on one menu with a lake view.

activities.title: Hot Breakfast After Sunrise at Sarangkot Tea Shop
activities.description: Warm up with instant noodles, omelette, and sweet tea from the village shops — a post-sunrise family ritual.

activities.title: International Mountain Museum — Himalayan Expedition History
activities.description: Life-sized expedition models, summit footage, and real climbing gear — older kids love the Edmund Hillary and Tenzing Norgay section.

activities.title: Evening Ice Cream at Lakeside Promenade
activities.description: Traditional Nepali kulfi and imported ice cream flavours from the lakeside dessert stalls.

activities.title: Davis Falls Waterfall Morning Visit
activities.description: The most dramatic waterfall near Pokhara — in winter it's calmer but still spectacular as it disappears underground.

activities.title: Gupteshwor Cave Shiva Shrine Exploration
activities.description: Connected to Davis Falls below — the cave descends to a Shiva lingam shrine and kids can hear the waterfall echoing inside.

activities.title: Seti River Gorge Overlook — Milky White Rushing Water
activities.description: Lean over the bridge railing to watch the milky white Seti carve through a 10-metre wide gorge — kids find this thrilling.

activities.title: Lakeside Pizza Lunch for the Family
activities.description: Wood-fired pizza and fresh pasta in a relaxed garden setting — perfect mid-holiday family lunch.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Afternoon Cycle Ride Along Shore
activities.description: Rent bicycles for the family and cycle the 3 km lakeside path — flat, scenic, and fun for all ages.

activities.title: Lakeside Picnic Breakfast at Begnas Shore
activities.description: Spread out on the lakeshore grass with snacks from Pokhara — the calm lake and distant hills make a perfect family photo.

activities.title: Rupa Lake Short Nature Walk
activities.description: A 10-minute drive from Begnas leads to the quieter Rupa Lake — short walk through rice paddies and local farmland.

activities.title: Final Souvenir and Last Ice Cream Lakeside
activities.description: Kids pick their final souvenirs and everyone gets a last kulfi before heading to the bus or airport.

activities.title: Annapurna Panorama Sunrise at Sarangkot
activities.description: Classic Pokhara opening — Dhaulagiri, Annapurna I–IV, and Machhapuchhre all lit orange at dawn from 1592m.

activities.title: Tandem Paragliding Flight over Phewa Lake
activities.description: 30-minute tandem flight launched from Sarangkot — spiral dives, thermal riding, and landing on the Lakeside beach with the full Annapurna range behind you.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Golden Hour Kayaking
activities.description: Single kayak rental at dusk — paddle toward the World Peace Stupa side with Machhapuchhre reflecting in the water.

activities.title: Early Breakfast Before Rafting
activities.description: Light breakfast of omelette and toast before a physically demanding morning on the water.

activities.title: Post-Rafting Dal Bhat Lunch
activities.description: Replenish after the rafting with a full dal bhat set — the body demands rice after a morning in cold water.

activities.title: International Mountain Museum — Everest History
activities.description: Afternoon wind-down — exhibits on all 8000m peaks, expedition gear, and the history of Himalayan climbing.

activities.title: Farewell Lakeside Dinner Before Bus Back
activities.description: Middle Eastern and fusion food on Lakeside — final meal before the evening bus or flight back.

activities.title: Couples Spa and Aromatherapy at Temple Tree
activities.description: Two-hour aromatherapy and hot stone massage for two — the ideal Valentine's afternoon before the evening.
activities.location: Temple Tree Resort and Spa Pokhara

activities.title: Valentine's Sunset Private Rowboat on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Private rowboat hired just for two — watch the Annapurna range turn from white to pink to gold at sunset, most romantic moment in Nepal.

activities.title: Private Jeep Sunrise at Sarangkot Together
activities.description: Hire a private jeep at 4:45 AM — watch the full Annapurna range emerge from darkness in total privacy.

activities.title: Luxury Sarangkot Breakfast with Himalayan Views
activities.description: French toast, fresh juice, and coffee at a terrace restaurant as the mountains glow in morning light.

activities.title: Couples Tandem Paragliding over Phewa Lake
activities.description: Two separate tandem flights launched together — 30 minutes each soaring above the lake with the Himalayas as backdrop.

activities.title: Dawn Meditation Together at World Peace Stupa
activities.description: Hike the forest trail at 5:30 AM for a meditative sunrise at the Japanese Buddhist stupa — serene and completely uncrowded.

activities.title: Private Canoe at Begnas Lake — No Crowds
activities.description: A 30-minute drive to the most peaceful lake near Pokhara — private canoe with no tourists, just rice paddies and bird calls.

activities.title: Resort Pool and Afternoon Relaxation
activities.description: Afternoon by the resort pool with Himalayan views — no agenda, just two sun loungers and cold drinks.
activities.location: Temple Tree Resort and Spa Pokhara

activities.title: Final Farewell Breakfast at Fishtail Lodge
activities.description: Cross by rope-raft one last time for a full English breakfast on the private island — the most memorable final morning in Nepal.

activities.title: Lakeside Morning Photography Stroll
activities.description: Slow walk along the lakeshore with cameras — golden winter morning light on the Annapurna range for the last time.

activities.title: Final Romantic Lunch before Departure
activities.description: Italian farewell lunch — wood-fired pizza, good wine, and the last look at Phewa Lake before heading to the airport.

activities.title: Check-In and Lens Prep at Lakeside Guesthouse
activities.description: Settle in and prepare lenses for the first golden hour — scout the ghats on arrival.

activities.title: Scout Phewa Boathouse Alley for Compositions
activities.description: Walk the lakeside jetties to identify the best angles for tomorrow's pre-dawn session.

activities.title: Lakeside Dal Bhat Dinner at Local Joint
activities.description: Budget well on food so you can spend on the workshop — NPR 350 dal bhat near the lake.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Temple Circumambulation by Boat
activities.description: Hire a rowboat and circle the island shooting every angle — soft morning light is ideal.

activities.title: Midday Street Life Study on Lakeside Promenade
activities.description: Document café facades, paraglider landings, and market life in the harsh midday sun.

activities.title: Street Breakfast — Sel Roti and Chiya
activities.description: Street vendor sel roti with local tea — NPR 80 and the best morning fuel.

activities.title: Cull and Backup Session at Lakeside Café
activities.description: Edit over a cappuccino — star-rate the morning's frames and clear cards for evening.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Sunset Shoot from Boat
activities.description: Cross the lake at 5pm — fire-orange sky behind the pagoda silhouette.

activities.title: Early Taxi to Begnas Lake
activities.description: Hire a private taxi for NPR 600 — arrive before sunrise when no other visitors are there.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn Shared Jeep to Sarangkot
activities.description: Share the jeep with fellow photographers — NPR 400 per person to the viewpoint.

activities.title: Sarangkot Sunrise — Full Annapurna Range Shoot
activities.description: Arrive 30 minutes before sunrise — shoot the blue-to-gold transition over six Himalayan peaks.

activities.title: Gurung Village Portraits at Kaskikot
activities.description: Traditional Gurung village 30 minutes from Sarangkot — elders in doorways at 8am golden light.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Island Temple from Rowboat
activities.description: Rent a wooden rowboat and circle the island shrine — shoot from all four angles.

activities.title: Dawn Mist Reflections at Begnas Lake
activities.description: Nepal's second largest lake — morning mist hovers over the surface at 5:30am.

activities.title: Fisherman Portrait Session at Sunrise
activities.description: Local fishermen cast nets at first light — silhouetted against the golden water.

activities.title: Fresh Fish Lunch at Begnas Village Restaurant
activities.description: Eat at the small restaurant by the dam — whole mustard fish from the lake.

activities.title: Return to Pokhara for Evening Edit Session
activities.description: Back by 6pm — sort and cull 500+ Begnas frames before tomorrow's early rise.

activities.title: Davis Falls Long Exposure Waterfall
activities.description: Screw on the ND filter — 30-second exposures turn the falls into silk.

activities.title: Seti Gorge Slot Canyon Shots
activities.description: Milky white river through an impossibly narrow gorge — dramatic contrast with the grey rock.

activities.title: Lakeside Café Edit and Rest
activities.description: Process the waterfall and gorge shots — export selects for social media from here.

activities.title: International Mountain Museum Portrait Gallery Study
activities.description: Compare your week's work with legendary expedition photography — study composition techniques.

activities.title: Mountain View Café Breakfast
activities.description: Egg omelette and coffee with a clear Annapurna view — NPR 350.

activities.title: Paraglider Landing Zone Action Shoot
activities.description: Photograph paragliders landing on the lakeside field — dramatic panning shots at 1/1000s.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Sunset Portrait Shoot
activities.description: Position on the east terrace — stupa silhouette sharply against the orange sky.

activities.title: Final Sarangkot Sunrise — October Clarity
activities.description: October has the clearest skies of the year — load the biggest memory card and shoot RAW.

activities.title: Sarangkot Village Farewell Morning Portraits
activities.description: Walk back through the village — morning life portraits in the best October light.

activities.title: Lakeside Market Souvenir Shopping
activities.description: Pick up handmade Thangka prints and carved wooden photo frames as mementos.

activities.title: Farewell Photo Walk at Phewa Lake
activities.description: One final stroll with the camera before the evening bus back to Kathmandu.

activities.title: Retreat Check-In and Orientation
activities.description: Settle into the wellness guesthouse — meet the instructor and review the 5-day program.

activities.title: Lakeside Arrival Evening Promenade
activities.description: Gentle walk along the lake at dusk — first breathing exercises by the water.

activities.title: Pre-Sunrise Shared Jeep to Sarangkot
activities.description: Share the jeep with retreat participants — NPR 400 per person to the viewpoint.

activities.title: Guided Outdoor Yoga at Sarangkot Viewpoint
activities.description: 90-minute yoga session with the full Annapurna range as backdrop — sun salutations at sunrise.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Natural Swimming
activities.description: Cool off in the designated calm swimming area — crystal-clear lake with mountain backdrop.

activities.title: 2-Hour Ayurvedic Full Body Massage
activities.description: Certified therapist performs abhyanga treatment with warm herbal oils — deeply restorative.

activities.title: Group Evening Breathwork and Yoga Nidra
activities.description: Guided pranayama and yoga nidra session — close the day at the retreat centre.

activities.title: Stupa Kora Walk and Mindful Reflection
activities.description: Circumambulate the stupa three times — spin each prayer wheel slowly and intentionally.

activities.title: Begnas Lake Solo Kayaking
activities.description: 2-hour solo paddle on Nepal's second largest lake — meditative rhythm on still water.

activities.title: Vegetarian Lakeside Lunch
activities.description: Fresh salad bowl and lime water at a Lakeside health café after returning from Begnas.

activities.title: Hilltop Herbal Tea at Ridge Teahouse
activities.description: Sit with local shepherds over butter tea — wide valley panorama from the ridge.

activities.title: Mindful Descent Through Terraced Farm Path
activities.description: Walk down through mustard and millet terraces — slow, meditative descending.

activities.title: Evening Lakeside Yoga Flow at Phewa Shore
activities.description: Open-air yoga on the grass as the sun dips behind the western hills.

activities.title: Guided Journaling and Intention-Setting
activities.description: Facilitated writing exercise — capture insights from the retreat for the journey home.

activities.title: Closing Yoga Flow with the Group
activities.description: Final 60-minute moving meditation — a flowing sequence to close the retreat week.

activities.title: Farewell Sattvic Breakfast with Participants
activities.description: Shared meal with fellow retreat guests — exchange contacts and leave with new connections.

activities.title: Afternoon Tourist Bus Back to Kathmandu
activities.description: 6-hour scenic return — arrive in Kathmandu by evening, rested and renewed.

activities.title: Durbar Square Heritage Walk
activities.description: Royal palace, 55-Window Palace, Vatsala Temple — finest medieval architecture.

activities.title: Nyatapola Temple — Nepal's Tallest Pagoda
activities.description: Five-storied pagoda at Taumadhi Square — 108 steps, five pairs of guardian figures.

activities.title: Peacock Window at Dattatreya Square
activities.description: The finest woodcarving in Nepal — a 500-year-old masterpiece.

activities.title: Local Bus Arrival from Kathmandu
activities.description: NPR 50 city bus from Kathmandu — arrive early to beat the Tihar festival crowds.

activities.title: Nyatapola Temple Climb — Five-Storey Pagoda
activities.description: Climb the 108 steps past five pairs of guardian figures — best Tihar overview from the top.

activities.title: Juju Dhau and Bara Festival Lunch at Taumadhi
activities.description: King curd in a clay pot and crispy lentil patties — the traditional Tihar festival meal.

activities.title: Woodcarving Workshop Visit near Durbar Square
activities.description: Watch master carvers creating intricate temple pieces using medieval chisels and mallets.

activities.title: Morning Rituals at Dattatreya Square
activities.description: Witness elderly Newaris performing morning puja at the oldest temple in Bhaktapur.

activities.title: Peacock Window Close-Up Study
activities.description: Nepal's finest woodcarving — a 500-year-old peacock carved from a single piece.

activities.title: Thimi Papier-Mache Workshop Visit
activities.description: See craftsmen making traditional festival masks in the village of Thimi.

activities.title: Juju Dhau — The King Curd Experience
activities.description: The original — thicker, creamier, and tangier than anywhere else in Nepal.

activities.title: Yomari at Local Home Kitchen
activities.description: Rice-flour dumplings filled with chaku — traditional Newari sweet.

activities.title: Choila and Aila at Evening Newari Tavern
activities.description: Spiced buff meat with local rice spirit — the quintessential Newari evening.

activities.title: Pre-Crowd Durbar Square at Dawn
activities.description: Arrive at 6 AM — completely empty squares, golden raking light on the temples. The 55-Window Palace and Vatsala Temple glow without a single tourist in frame.

activities.title: Chiya and People Watching at Dattatreya Square Tea Stall
activities.description: Sit at a roadside stall with a NPR 20 clay-cup chiya — watch the neighbourhood wake up as morning light cuts across Dattatreya Temple's carved facade at a perfect 45-degree angle.

activities.title: Warm Afternoon Light Study at 55-Window Palace Facade
activities.description: Return to the main square at 2:30 PM when the sun is low and warm — the 55-Window Palace facade glows amber and deep relief shadows bring each carved window frame into sharp contrast.

activities.title: Luxury Lunch at Fishtail Lodge Restaurant
activities.description: Multi-course lunch on the Fishtail Lodge terrace — Continental and Nepali fusion with lakeside panorama.

activities.title: Bagmati Heritage Walk Along the Forested Ghats
activities.description: Walk the stone-stepped ghats north from Pashupatinath — sadhus meditating under pipal trees, ancient riverside shrines, and the quiet forest path toward Gokarna.

activities.title: Tibetan Thenthuk Noodle Soup Lunch near Boudhanath
activities.description: Hearty hand-pulled Tibetan noodle soup with butter tea at a simple restaurant steps from the stupa perimeter — eaten where the monks eat.

activities.title: Kopan Monastery Garden Walk and Butter Lamp Prayer Hall
activities.description: A 30-minute uphill walk north of Boudha — explore terraced monastery gardens and the main prayer hall lit by hundreds of butter lamps during the afternoon prayers.

activities.title: Sunrise Walk up Swayambhunath Stupa Hill
activities.description: Climb the 365 steps before 7 AM — only monks and a few pilgrims are present, and the golden spire catches first light as the city spreads below in morning mist.

activities.title: Breakfast at Himalayan Java Coffee before Heading to Patan
activities.description: Nepal's finest espresso chain — strong flat whites and freshly baked pastries in Thamel before the short taxi to Patan Durbar Square.

activities.title: Newari Architecture Deep Dive at Patan Durbar Square
activities.description: Guided tour of Krishna Mandir, Vishwanath Temple, and the Malla palace facades — the finest concentration of Newari temple architecture in the world, covering 2000 years of craft.

activities.title: Mahabouddha Temple and Hiranya Varna Mahavihar Evening Walk
activities.description: The shikhara tower encrusted with 9000 Buddha images sits hidden down a narrow alley — nearby Golden Temple is a working Buddhist monastery with a gilded courtyard.

activities.title: All Three Squares Heritage Walk with Local Guide
activities.description: Expert local guide leads the full circuit through Durbar, Taumadhi, and Dattatreya squares — covering the 55-Window Palace, Nyatapola Temple, and the ancient Dattatreya shrine.

activities.title: Traditional Pottery Workshop at Pottery Square
activities.description: Try throwing a pot on the foot-powered wheel with expert guidance — buy a handmade ceramic oil lamp or bowl directly from the master potters who have worked this square for generations.

activities.title: Return to Kathmandu by Shared Taxi at Dusk
activities.description: Shared taxi back to Kathmandu for NPR 100 per seat — 45 minutes through the eastern valley, arriving in time for dinner in Thamel.

activities.title: Nagarkot Himalayan Sunrise — Full November Panorama
activities.description: Clear November morning — Everest, Lhotse, Makalu, Kanchenjunga, Annapurna, and Langtang all visible in one sweeping arc from the hilltop viewpoint at 2195m.

activities.title: Changu Narayan Ridge Trek Through Pine and Oak Forest
activities.description: 2.5-hour forest walk descending the ridge from Nagarkot — pass pine groves, Newari villages, and terraced fields with continuous Himalayan views before reaching Nepal's oldest UNESCO temple.

activities.title: Village Teahouse Dal Bhat Lunch at Changu
activities.description: Simple teahouse at the foot of the temple hill — unlimited dal bhat with pickle and greens at wooden benches with terraced valley views below.

activities.title: Taxi from Tribhuvan Airport to Thamel Guesthouse
activities.description: Private taxi from arrivals to a mid-range Thamel guesthouse — 30 minutes in normal traffic, NPR 600 negotiated at the pre-paid counter.

activities.title: Night Market Browse and Budget Chow Mein Dinner
activities.description: Evening walk through the night market and NPR 180 chow mein from a local dhaba.

activities.title: Garden of Dreams Twilight Stroll
activities.description: Neoclassical garden oasis of Kaiser Mahal — fountains, pavilions, and bougainvillea lit in the early evening, a calm contrast to the Thamel streets outside.

activities.title: Thamel Craft and Singing Bowl Browse
activities.description: Pick up a hand-hammered singing bowl, pashmina shawl, or thangka print on the first evening — bargain gently and check quality before committing.

activities.title: Dawn at Pashupatinath Ghats — Cremation Fires and Morning Puja
activities.description: Arrive at 6 AM to witness the morning abhishek ritual and the sacred cremation fires on the Bagmati ghats — orange marigolds, chanting priests, and river mist.

activities.title: Bagmati Ghat Heritage Walk with Sadhus
activities.description: Walk the riverside ghats north from Pashupatinath — sadhus meditating under pipal trees, pilgrims bathing, and ancient stone shrines along the forested bank.

activities.title: Kopan Monastery Terraced Garden and Prayer Hall Visit
activities.description: 30-minute uphill walk north of Boudha — explore the monastery gardens and the main prayer hall with hundreds of butter lamps during afternoon prayers.

activities.title: Thamel Street Momo and Sekuwa Dinner
activities.description: End at the roadside stalls near Thamel Chowk — steam momos, grilled buff sekuwa, and a fresh lime soda for NPR 600.

activities.title: Breakfast at Himalayan Java Coffee Thamel
activities.description: Nepal's finest espresso chain — strong flat whites and pastries before heading to Kathmandu Durbar Square.

activities.title: Patan Durbar Square Afternoon Architecture Tour
activities.description: Finest Newari architecture in the world — Krishna Mandir, Vishwanath Temple, and the restored Malla palace facades in the warm afternoon golden light.

activities.title: Patan Museum Classical Bronze and Stone Art Tour
activities.description: Nepal's finest art museum — browse Malla-era bronze deities, carved stone panels, and ceremonial objects in a beautifully restored palace complex.

activities.title: Gupteshwor Cave — Roaring Underground River in Monsoon
activities.description: The underground river is at its loudest and most dramatic during monsoon — a completely different experience from dry season.

activities.title: Mugling Riverside Snack Break — Freshly Roasted Corn
activities.description: Brief stop at the famous Mugling junction where the Trisuli and Marshyangdi rivers meet — buy freshly roasted corn and boiled eggs from the roadside vendors.

activities.title: Lakeside Check-In and First Annapurna View
activities.description: Check in to the guesthouse and walk straight to the lakeshore — the first view of Machhapuchhre and the Annapurna range reflected in Phewa Lake is genuinely breathtaking.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Island Temple Rowboat Crossing
activities.description: Hire a wooden rowboat to the island shrine in the middle of Phewa Lake — the short crossing offers the best angle on the Annapurna reflection.

activities.title: Welcome Pokhara Dinner at Moondance Restaurant
activities.description: Pokhara's most atmospheric restaurant — Nepali and continental menu with a lake view terrace, perfect for the first night.

activities.title: Annapurna Panorama Sunrise at Sarangkot Viewpoint
activities.description: Shared jeep at 4:30 AM to the most iconic viewpoint in Nepal — Dhaulagiri, Annapurna I–IV, and Machhapuchhre all lit orange at dawn.

activities.title: Sarangkot Village Walk and Local Tea
activities.description: After sunrise, walk back through Sarangkot village — buy clay-cup chiya from a local teahouse and enjoy terraced hillside views on the 45-minute descent.

activities.title: Budget Breakfast at Lakeside Bakery-Cafe
activities.description: Freshly baked banana bread, filter coffee, and eggs benedict at one of the Lakeside bakery-cafes — fuel for the paragliding flight.

activities.title: Post-Paragliding Celebration Lunch at Lakeside Terrace
activities.description: Celebrate the flight with a full meal and review your GoPro footage over pasta and cold Carlsberg on a lakeside terrace.

activities.title: Dawn Meditation Walk Along Phewa Lake Shore
activities.description: The lake is glassiest before 7 AM — walk the shoreline path for the Machhapuchhre reflection before any wind disturbs the mirror-perfect surface.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Full-Day Rowboat — Annapurna Reflections
activities.description: Hire a wooden rowboat and drift across the lake — the Annapurna reflection is most complete between 9 and 11 AM before afternoon clouds build.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Island Temple Morning Visit
activities.description: Row to the island Barahi Devi shrine and walk the perimeter — the small temple surrounded by water and Himalayan peaks is one of Nepal's most serene spots.

activities.title: Farewell Lakeside Dinner at Moondance Restaurant
activities.description: Final dinner on the lake terrace — dal bhat set with multiple sides or pasta, ending a perfect Pokhara chapter.

activities.title: Lakeside Picnic Breakfast at Begnas Shore
activities.description: Spread out on the lakeshore grass with snacks from Pokhara — the calm lake and distant Annapurna hills make a perfect quiet final morning.

activities.title: Couples Spa at Tiger Mountain Lodge
activities.description: Synchronised hot-stone massage, herbal bath, and aromatherapy for two — views of Annapurna South throughout.

activities.title: Last Souvenir Shopping at Lakeside Market
activities.description: Final browse for prayer flags, handmade paper notebooks, and Thangka prints from the Lakeside market before the return journey.

activities.title: Tourist Bus or Flight Departure from Pokhara
activities.description: Evening tourist bus back to Kathmandu (NPR 800) or short domestic flight — either way the journey home is framed by the last Himalayan views.

activities.title: Thamel Arrival — First Himalayan Bookshop and Souvenir Browse
activities.description: Settle in and explore the tourist hub of Nepal — browse Himalayan bookshops, singing bowl shops, and outdoor gear stores with the family.

activities.title: Thamel Craft Shopping — Singing Bowls and Pashminas
activities.description: Let each family member choose a small Himalayan souvenir — hand-hammered singing bowls, yak-wool scarves, and thangka postcards.

activities.title: Quiet Final Morning Canoe at Begnas Lake
activities.description: Peaceful farewell to Nepal — canoe or rowboat on the serene lake with local fishermen before the long journey home.

activities.title: Dawn Rituals at Pashupatinath — Morning Abhishek
activities.description: Arrive at 6:30 AM to witness the sacred morning puja and the cremation fires on the Bagmati ghats — the most important Hindu site in Nepal explained by a local guide.

activities.title: Bagmati Riverside Heritage Walk — Sadhus and Stone Shrines
activities.description: Walk the forested riverside ghats north of Pashupatinath — sadhus, ancient shrines, and the peaceful forest path that connects Nepal's most sacred sites.

activities.title: Boudhanath Kora with Tibetan Pilgrims — Spinning Prayer Wheels
activities.description: Walk the circumambulation path with Tibetan pilgrims as butter lamps are lit — the scale of the stupa is only understood on foot with the painted wisdom-eyes looming overhead.

activities.title: Family Street Momo Dinner at Thamel Chowk Stalls
activities.description: Roadside stalls near Thamel Chowk — steamed momos, fried noodles, and sekuwa skewers for the whole family in a lively street atmosphere.

activities.title: Monkey Temple at Sunrise — Swayambhunath Family Climb
activities.description: Climb the 365 steps with the family at 7 AM — children love the resident monkeys grooming in the dawn light and the giant painted eyes above the stupa.

activities.title: Kathmandu Durbar Square Family Heritage Walk
activities.description: Guide leads the family through Hanuman Dhoka Palace, the Kumari Living Goddess courtyard, and the open Taleju Temple plinth — children engage with the living culture.

activities.title: Patan Museum Family Tour — Bronze Gods and Stone Kings
activities.description: Nepal's finest museum — bronze deities, ancient manuscripts, and carved stone panels in a beautifully restored Malla palace.

activities.title: Local Bus Ride to Bhaktapur — Family Transport Adventure
activities.description: NPR 50 city bus from Kathmandu — an authentic local transport experience children remember, arriving at the edge of the medieval city.

activities.title: Kids' Hands-On Pottery Lesson at Pottery Square
activities.description: Children aged 5+ try spinning the traditional foot-powered wheel under a master potter's guidance — messy, joyful, and the most memorable 45 minutes in Bhaktapur.

activities.title: Steaming Chiya and Sel Roti Breakfast at Chabahil
activities.description: Local tea and crispy sel roti at a streetside stall near the temple — fuel up the way pilgrims have for centuries.

activities.title: Nyatapola Temple Step-Counting Challenge for Kids
activities.description: Race the children up the 108 steps past five pairs of stone guardian figures — the tallest pagoda temple in Nepal becomes a family game.

activities.title: Nagarkot Himalayan Sunrise — Full Panoramic Arc
activities.description: Drive to the hilltop viewpoint at 2195m — Everest, Lhotse, Annapurna, and Langtang all visible in one sweeping panorama on a clear March morning.

activities.title: Changu Narayan Ridge Trek Through Pine Forest
activities.description: 2.5-hour forest walk descending from Nagarkot along the ridge — pine groves, Newari villages, and terraced fields with continuous valley views.

activities.title: Changu Narayan Temple — Nepal's Oldest UNESCO Heritage Site
activities.description: 7th-century Vishnu temple with the oldest stone inscription in the valley — a knowledgeable guide reveals the detail of the exquisite carvings.

activities.title: Village Teahouse Dal Bhat Lunch at Changu
activities.description: Simple teahouse at the foot of the temple hill — unlimited dal bhat with achar and greens eaten at wooden benches with terraced valley views.

activities.title: Return to Kathmandu by Shared Jeep
activities.description: Shared jeep back to Kathmandu — 30–40 minutes through the eastern valley, arriving in time for an early hotel rest before tomorrow's bus.

activities.title: Mugling Riverside Snack Stop — Roasted Corn and Local Tea
activities.description: Famous stop at the Trisuli–Marshyangdi confluence — buy freshly roasted corn, boiled eggs, and sweet tea from the roadside stalls.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Family Sunset Rowboat Drift
activities.description: Rent a wooden rowboat as the sun dips — the Annapurna range turns from white to pink to gold across the mirror-still water.

activities.title: Annapurna at Dawn — Sarangkot Sunrise for the Whole Family
activities.description: Shared jeep at 4:30 AM to the most iconic viewpoint in Nepal — six peaks above 7000m in one frame, Machhapuchhre closest and sharpest.

activities.title: Boudhanath Stupa Kora Morning Circumambulation
activities.description: Walk the sacred kora (circumambulation) around the world's largest stupa with Tibetan monks and spinning prayer wheels.

activities.title: Tandem Paragliding Flight over Phewa Lake
activities.description: Nepal's most popular adventure activity — 30-minute soaring flight from Sarangkot ridge, spiralling above the lake with the Annapurna backdrop.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Afternoon Family Rowboat to Island Temple
activities.description: Hire rowboats for the family — paddle to the Tal Barahi island temple and circle the lake in the warm afternoon light.

activities.title: Dawn Walk Along Phewa Lake Shore — Still Water Reflections
activities.description: The lake is glassiest at 6:30 AM — walk the shoreline path for the Machhapuchhre and Annapurna reflection before any wind disturbs the mirror surface.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Full Day Rowboat — Annapurna Reflections
activities.description: Hire a large rowboat for the family — drift across the lake toward the World Peace Stupa, enjoying the Annapurna reflection at its best in the morning light.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Sunset Panorama — Best Spot in Pokhara
activities.description: The definitive Pokhara view — Phewa Lake, the city, and the full Annapurna silhouette in one frame at golden hour.

activities.title: Seti River Gorge — Milky White Water Through a Narrow Slot
activities.description: Lean over the bridge railing to watch the milky Seti River carve through a 10-metre wide gorge — children find this thrillingly dramatic.

activities.title: Davis Falls and Gupteshwor Cave Combined Visit
activities.description: The waterfall plunges underground into the Gupteshwor cave below — the combined ticket includes the cave's Shiva lingam shrine and echoing underground river.

activities.title: Begnas Lake Late Afternoon Family Escape
activities.description: 30-minute drive to Pokhara's peaceful sister lake — hire a rowboat for a quiet late afternoon on the water with no crowds.

activities.title: Final Pokhara Family Dinner at Moondance Restaurant
activities.description: Last meal in Pokhara — the full family together on the lake terrace, sharing one last dal bhat and Pokhara memories.

activities.title: Dal Bhat Lunch at Himalayan Java Café, Boudha
activities.description: Affordable dal bhat or pasta at the popular Boudha branch — shaded courtyard seating with stupa views.

activities.title: Begnas Lake Village Fresh Fish Lunch
activities.description: Whole freshwater trout from the lake grilled with mustard at the small restaurant by the dam — the freshest fish of the entire trip.

activities.title: Tourist Bus or Flight Departure from Pokhara
activities.description: Afternoon tourist bus back to Kathmandu (NPR 800) or a 25-minute domestic flight — the final Himalayan view from Pokhara airport is a perfect goodbye.

activities.title: Local Bus from Tribhuvan Airport to Thamel — NPR 80
activities.description: Local city bus from the airport ring road directly to Thamel — NPR 80, 40 minutes, and the most budget-friendly airport transfer in Nepal.

activities.title: Free Heritage Walk from Thamel to Kathmandu Durbar Square
activities.description: Several tip-based free walking tours depart Thamel in the afternoon — 2-hour loop covering Durbar Square, Kumari Ghar courtyard, Asan Bazaar, and Indra Chowk.

activities.title: Swayambhunath Free Back-Route Forest Hike
activities.description: Skip the main entrance and climb the quiet back trail through the forest — free of charge, peaceful, and the same panoramic valley view at the top.

activities.title: Kathmandu Durbar Square Royal Palace Heritage Walk
activities.description: Explore Hanuman Dhoka Palace, the Living Goddess Kumari Ghar courtyard, and Taleju Temple — the historic royal heart of old Kathmandu.

activities.title: Asan Bazaar Afternoon Spice and Market Walk
activities.description: Wander the stalls piled with Nepali spices, dried herbs, colourful powders, and street snacks — the most atmospheric bazaar in old Kathmandu.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn at Pashupatinath Ghats — Sacred Morning Rituals
activities.description: Arrive at 6 AM to witness the morning abhishek and cremation fires on the Bagmati ghats — Nepal's most sacred Hindu site at its most powerful.

activities.title: Free Bagmati Ghat Riverside Walk After Rituals
activities.description: Walk the forested ghats north from Pashupatinath — sadhus meditating, pilgrims bathing, and ancient stone shrines in the quiet morning.

activities.title: Swayambhunath Monkey Temple Afternoon Climb
activities.description: Climb 365 steps to the hilltop stupa — monkeys, Buddha eyes, and a 360° view of the Kathmandu Valley.

activities.title: Morning Kora at Boudhanath Stupa — Spinning 108 Prayer Wheels
activities.description: Walk the great circumambulation path with Tibetan pilgrims — spin every prayer wheel and breathe the incense rising from hundreds of butter lamps.

activities.title: Free Garden Walk at Kopan Monastery
activities.description: 30-minute uphill walk from Boudha — the terraced monastery garden is open to respectful visitors and the view across the valley is remarkable.

activities.title: Budget Dinner at Chhapan Dukan Street Stalls
activities.description: Row of street-food stalls near the old bazaar — chatpate, fried noodles, and fresh fruit chaat for under NPR 200.

activities.title: Bhaktapur Full Heritage Walk — All Three Medieval Squares
activities.description: Walk through Durbar, Taumadhi, and Dattatreya squares on foot — 55-Window Palace, Nyatapola Temple, and the Peacock Window in the best-preserved medieval city in Asia.

activities.title: Pottery Square Live Wheel Demonstration
activities.description: Watch master potters throw clay on ancient foot-powered wheels — a living tradition unchanged for centuries, completely free to observe.

activities.title: Peacock Window Close-Up at Dattatreya Square
activities.description: Walk to Bhaktapur's oldest temple square — the 500-year-old Peacock Window carved from a single piece of wood is Nepal's finest woodcarving and free to admire.

activities.title: Patan UNESCO Heritage Walk — Krishna Mandir and Palace Facades
activities.description: Walk the finest concentration of Newari temple architecture in the world — Krishna Mandir, Vishwanath Temple, and the restored Malla royal palace.

activities.title: Budget Dal Bhat Lunch near Patan Durbar
activities.description: Small no-frills restaurant just south of the square — unlimited dal bhat for NPR 200, popular with local office workers.

activities.title: Night Bus to Pokhara — NPR 700 Overnight to Save Accommodation
activities.description: Overnight tourist bus from Kathmandu to Pokhara — NPR 700, departs 7 PM, arrives 1 AM, saving a night's hostel cost.

activities.title: Kirtipur Ancient Town Evening Heritage Walk
activities.description: Explore the hilltop town that resisted Prithvi Narayan Shah — Uma Maheshwar Temple, Bagh Bhairab, and narrow Newari alleys at dusk.

activities.title: Hostel Dorm Check-In and Rest at Lakeside Budget Guesthouse
activities.description: NPR 400–600 dorm bed at a Lakeside budget guesthouse — shower, rest, and recharge before the afternoon's activities.

activities.title: Free Forest Trail Hike to World Peace Stupa
activities.description: 45-minute uphill forest trail from the lake's southern shore — completely free, the white stupa sits at 1100m with 360° views over Phewa Lake and the Annapurna range.

activities.title: Shared Rowboat Drift on Phewa Lake with Backpackers
activities.description: Find other solo travellers at the boat ghat and split the cost — NPR 100 each versus NPR 400 alone, with the Annapurna reflection as a free bonus.

activities.title: Free Hike up to Sarangkot at Pre-Dawn
activities.description: Walk the forest trail instead of taking a jeep — 1.5 hours uphill, completely free, and more rewarding than the paid ride to the same Annapurna panorama.

activities.title: Shared Rowboat on Phewa Lake with Fellow Backpackers
activities.description: Split the cost of a rowboat with other hostel guests — NPR 100 each, drift to the island temple and back in the February morning calm.

activities.title: Free Visit to Tal Barahi Island Temple
activities.description: Row to the island Barahi Devi shrine in the middle of Phewa Lake — free entry, peaceful atmosphere, and the best mid-lake Himalayan view.

activities.title: Budget Dal Bhat Lunch near Phewa Lake
activities.description: Unlimited dal bhat with two vegetable sides for NPR 200 at a basic local restaurant behind the lakeside promenade.

activities.title: Free Phewa Lakeside Evening Promenade Stroll
activities.description: Walk the entire lit lakeside promenade as paragliders make their last landings and the Annapurna range silhouettes against the sunset sky — completely free.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Summit View — Lake and Full Annapurna Range
activities.description: Phewa Lake, the Pokhara valley, and the full Annapurna range in one panoramic frame — the best free vantage point in Pokhara.

activities.title: Changu Narayan Temple — Nepal's Oldest Vishnu Shrine
activities.description: UNESCO-listed hilltop temple with Nepal's oldest stone inscription from 464 CE — intricate Licchavi-era carvings and serene village setting.

activities.title: Davis Falls and Gupteshwor Cave — Best Value Combined Ticket
activities.description: The waterfall plunges into the underground cave below — the NPR 400 combined ticket covers both the falls and the cave's Shiva lingam shrine.

activities.title: Budget Night Market Chow Mein Dinner at Lakeside Stalls
activities.description: Stir-fried chow mein with vegetables and egg from a lakeside dhaba for NPR 180 — cheap, filling, and the right end to an active day.

activities.title: Free Swim and Relax at Begnas Lake Shore
activities.description: The shallow southern shore is calm and clean — bring a towel and enjoy a free swim at one of Nepal's least-touristed lakes.

activities.title: Hired Row with Local Fisherman on Begnas Lake
activities.description: Negotiate a short row with a local fisherman heading out to his nets — NPR 300, deeply authentic, and a glimpse into lake village life.

activities.title: Private Sunset Dinner Cruise on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Catered dinner aboard a private wooden boat as the Annapurna sunset fades — wine and candlelight on the water.

activities.title: Rupa Lake Short Walk Through Rice Paddies
activities.description: 10-minute walk north from Begnas leads to the quieter Rupa Lake — walk the farm paths through rice paddies and small settlements with perfect hill reflections.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn Final Phewa Lake Shore Walk
activities.description: One last 5:30 AM walk along the lakeshore — the lake is glass-still and the Annapurna range silhouettes in the first light before the bus.

activities.title: Morning Tourist Bus Back to Kathmandu
activities.description: Morning tourist or local bus back to Kathmandu — 6–7 hours, NPR 800, window seat on the left for the best river views.

activities.title: Arrival Dal Bhat Lunch in Thamel
activities.description: Arrive back in Kathmandu by early afternoon — end the 10-day triangle with one last unlimited dal bhat set before departing or extending the trip.

activities.title: Deopatan Village Morning Walk Through Living Heritage
activities.description: Wander the village adjacent to Pashupatinath — craftsmen making clay lamps, women weaving, and hidden courtyard shrines.

activities.title: Relaxing Spa Treatment
activities.description: Unwind and rejuvenate with a luxurious spa treatment at a top-tier wellness center in Pokhara, perfect for relaxing after your mountain adventure.

activities.title: Private Heritage Walk Through Thamel Old Quarter
activities.description: Guided stroll through ancient Newari courtyards, hidden temples, and boutique shops before dusk.

activities.title: Welcome Dinner — Krishnarpan 22 Courses
activities.description: Nepal's most celebrated restaurant — a 22-course Newari tasting menu with traditional brass service.

activities.title: Scenic Everest Mountain Flight
activities.description: One-hour mountain flight past Everest, Lhotse, and Kanchenjunga — window seat guaranteed.

activities.title: Gourmet Breakfast at Dwarika's Heritage Courtyard
activities.description: Lavish spread of Continental and Nepali breakfast under centuries-old carved wooden screens.

activities.title: Private Bhaktapur Art History Tour
activities.description: Expert art historian guide for a 4-hour deep dive into Newari woodcarving, bronze casting, and royal history.

activities.title: Dawn Puja at Pashupatinath Sacred Ghats
activities.description: Private guide for the pre-dawn aarti ceremony — witness the sacred rituals at the holiest Hindu site in Nepal.

activities.title: Private UNESCO Heritage Tour of Kathmandu Valley
activities.description: Exclusive private guide covering Kathmandu Durbar Square, Boudhanath, and Swayambhunath in a single curated morning.

activities.title: Full Panchakarma Day Spa at Dwarika's
activities.description: Traditional Ayurvedic full-body detox — herbal steam, Abhyanga oil massage, and Shirodhara forehead treatment.

activities.title: Leisurely Garden Breakfast at Dwarika's Courtyard
activities.description: Last morning in Kathmandu — unhurried breakfast in the tranquil courtyard garden before departure.

activities.title: Patan Durbar Square & Golden Temple with Private Guide
activities.description: Explore the finest concentration of Newari architecture in Nepal — Krishna Mandir, Hiranya Varna Mahavihara, and royal courtyards.

activities.title: Chobar Gorge and Aadinath Lokeshwar Temple
activities.description: The narrow gorge where the Bagmati River cuts through the hills — legend says Manjushri drained the ancient lake that was the Kathmandu Valley.

activities.title: Helicopter Transfer to Pokhara
activities.description: 25-minute scenic private helicopter over forested hills — spectacular approach to the Annapurna foothills.

activities.title: Private Sarangkot Sunrise with Expert Guide
activities.description: Private jeep and naturalist guide for an undisturbed sunrise — Annapurna, Dhaulagiri, and Machhapuchhre glowing at dawn.

activities.title: Premium Tandem Paragliding with GoPro Package
activities.description: 45-minute premium thermaling flight over Phewa Lake with HD GoPro footage and professional pilot.

activities.title: Private Kayaking on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Guided kayak across the lake with Annapurna views — visit the Barahi Temple island by private canoe.

activities.title: Morning Yoga Session on Tiger Mountain Lodge Deck
activities.description: Private yoga instructor on the open deck with panoramic Annapurna views — start the day in stillness.

activities.title: Tal Barahi Temple Island Visit by Private Boat
activities.description: Row to the sacred two-storey temple on Phewa Lake island — rare chance for quiet prayer with no crowds.

activities.title: Gupteshwor Mahadev Cave Private Tour
activities.description: Sacred Shiva cave shrine directly above Davis Falls — private guide reveals the geological and mythological story.

activities.title: Farewell Lunch at The Pavilion, Fishtail Lodge
activities.description: Last Nepali lunch in luxury — open terrace over the lake, signature dal bhat with premium Himalayan ingredients.

activities.title: Grand Farewell Dinner at Fishtail Lodge
activities.description: Chef's tasting menu farewell dinner at the island lodge — private dining deck with Phewa Lake and Machhapuchhre at dusk.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn Aarti at Pashupatinath Main Temple Ghats
activities.description: Arrive before 6 AM to witness the sacred morning aarti ceremony at Nepal's holiest Hindu site — sadhus and pilgrims gather at the river ghats.

activities.title: Davis Falls Monsoon Thunderfall View
activities.description: The waterfall plunges into the cave below with full force — monsoon turns this into one of Nepal's most powerful waterfalls.

activities.title: Boudhanath Stupa Kora Morning Circumambulation
activities.description: Walk the sacred kora (circumambulation) around the world's largest stupa with Tibetan monks and spinning prayer wheels.

activities.title: Swayambhunath Monkey Temple Afternoon Climb
activities.description: Climb 365 steps to the hilltop stupa — monkeys, Buddha eyes, and a 360° view of the Kathmandu Valley.

activities.title: Kirtipur Ancient Town Evening Heritage Walk
activities.description: Explore the hilltop town that resisted Prithvi Narayan Shah — Uma Maheshwar Temple, Bagh Bhairab, and narrow Newari alleys at dusk.

activities.title: Deopatan Village Morning Walk Through Living Heritage
activities.description: Wander the village adjacent to Pashupatinath — craftsmen making clay lamps, women weaving, and hidden courtyard shrines.

activities.title: Chobar Gorge and Aadinath Lokeshwar Temple
activities.description: The narrow gorge where the Bagmati River cuts through the hills — legend says Manjushri drained the ancient lake that was the Kathmandu Valley.

activities.title: Thamel Street Food Evening Tour
activities.description: End the circuit with a self-guided street food crawl — chatpate, sekuwa, buff momo, and warm lapsi candy from Thamel's evening vendors.

activities.title: Ason Bazaar and Indra Chowk Traditional Market Walk
activities.description: Weave through the oldest bazaar in Kathmandu — spice merchants, marigold sellers, bead traders, and centuries-old neighborhood deities.

activities.title: Makhan Tole and Kumari Ghar Artisan Alley
activities.description: Browse thangka painters, metalwork shops, and woodcarvers on the lanes around Kumari Chowk — living craft tradition in action.

activities.title: Dal Bhat Lunch at Newa Lahana Traditional Kitchen
activities.description: Authentic Newari set meal served on traditional round plates — aalu tama, bara, yomari, and choila with rice beer.

activities.title: Thamel Street Art Night Walk and Craft Beer Garden
activities.description: End the day exploring Thamel's growing street mural scene and settle in at a rooftop craft beer bar for local brews and live music.

activities.title: Steaming Sel Roti Breakfast at Chabahil Stall
activities.description: Locals huddle over piping hot tea and freshly fried sel roti on a cold winter morning — the best NPR 100 breakfast in Kathmandu.

activities.title: Boudhanath Stupa Winter Kora Walk
activities.description: The stupa in December has fewer tourists — walk the kora slowly and watch monks chanting in the butter-lamp-lit gompas.

activities.title: Thamel Secondhand Bookshop Afternoon Browse
activities.description: Kathmandu's cluttered used bookshops are perfect for a cold afternoon — pick up trekking guides, Himalayan literature, or Nepali philosophy texts.

activities.title: Winter Sunrise at Swayambhunath Stupa
activities.description: The winter solstice sunrise over the valley — climb the 365 steps in early morning light and have the hilltop nearly to yourself.

activities.title: Kumari House and Kathmandu Durbar Square Winter Visit
activities.description: Winter is low season — explore Kathmandu Durbar Square without crowds and catch a glimpse of the Kumari (living goddess) at her window.

activities.title: Patan Old Town Winter Heritage Walk
activities.description: Wander the quieter backstreets of Patan in the golden winter light — bronze workshops, courtyard temples, and friendly locals.

activities.title: Hot Dal Soup Dinner at Patan Dhoka Newari Kitchen
activities.description: End with a warming Newari meal — hot lentil soup, saag, pickles, and rice at a tiny kitchen near the old city gate.

activities.title: Public Bus from Pokhara to Nayapul Trailhead
activities.description: The local Beni-bound bus from Pokhara Bus Park reaches Nayapul in 90 minutes — buy ticket at the window for NPR 200.

activities.title: Ulleri Stone Staircase Challenge — 3,800 Steps Climb
activities.description: The most famous staircase in Annapurna trekking — 3,800 stone steps straight up through dense rhododendron forest to Ulleri village.

activities.title: Budhanilkantha Sleeping Vishnu — Cosmic Reclining Statue
activities.description: A 1,500-year-old stone Vishnu reclining on a thousand-headed serpent in a water tank — one of Nepal's most remarkable outdoor sculptures.

activities.title: Stargazing from Ulleri Tea House Rooftop
activities.description: No light pollution at 1,960m — the Milky Way is visible with the naked eye on a clear November night.

activities.title: Early Tea House Breakfast Before the Forest Climb
activities.description: Ginger tea, tsampa porridge, and scrambled eggs at sunrise — the Dhaulagiri massif emerges above the clouds to the west.

activities.title: Ulleri to Ghorepani Through Rhododendron Forest
activities.description: Four-hour uphill trek through Nepal's largest rhododendron forest — in November the trees are bare but the trail has wonderful mountain views.

activities.title: Ghorepani Village Exploration and Viewpoint Walk
activities.description: Explore the small hillside village at 2,874m — prayer flags, mani walls, and the first clear sightline to Annapurna South.

activities.title: Deurali Pass Lower Trail Sunset Walk
activities.description: Short 40-minute walk toward Deurali for a partial Dhaulagiri sunset — no crowds, no entry fee, beautiful evening light.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn Poon Hill Summit for Himalayan Sunrise
activities.description: The classic Annapurna viewpoint at 3,210m — eight major Himalayan peaks including Dhaulagiri, Annapurna I, and Machhapuchhre all visible at sunrise.

activities.title: Ghorepani to Nayapul Full Descent Trek
activities.description: Five-hour descent via Tikhedhunga back to Nayapul — knees get a workout but the views back up to the massif are superb on a clear day.

activities.title: Public Bus Return from Nayapul to Pokhara
activities.description: Catch the afternoon Beni-Pokhara bus back to the city — 90 minutes and you are back at Lakeside.

activities.title: Trekker's Celebration Dinner on Pokhara Lakeside
activities.description: Cold beer and grilled chicken at a Lakeside restaurant — share Poon Hill photos with fellow trekkers and plan the next adventure.

activities.title: Pre-Dawn Aarti at Pashupatinath Main Temple Ghats
activities.description: Arrive before 6 AM to witness the sacred morning aarti ceremony at Nepal's holiest Hindu site — sadhus and pilgrims gather at the river ghats.

activities.title: Free Sarangkot Hike at Dawn
activities.description: Walk up the forest trail instead of taking a jeep — 1.5 hours, completely free, and more rewarding than the paid ride.

activities.title: NPR 150 Roti and Tea at Sarangkot Stall
activities.description: Local roti with butter and sweet milk tea from the village stalls — the ultra-budget breakfast with the best view.

activities.title: Shared Rowboat at Phewa Lake with Backpackers
activities.description: Find other solo travellers at the boat ghat and split the cost — NPR 100 each versus NPR 400 alone.

activities.title: Free Visit to Tal Barahi Island Temple
activities.description: Row to the island temple in the middle of Phewa Lake — free entry, spiritual atmosphere, no crowds midday.

activities.title: Unlimited Dal Bhat at Monsoon Mist Lakeside
activities.description: NPR 200 unlimited refill dal bhat while watching monsoon clouds roll dramatically over the Annapurnas.

activities.title: Free Lakeside Promenade Sunset Walk
activities.description: Evening stroll along the Phewa lakeshore promenade — street food stalls, live music from cafes, no cost.

activities.title: World Peace Stupa Free Forest Trail Hike
activities.description: Hike up through dense monsoon forest — completely free, dramatically scenic, 45 minutes each way.

activities.title: Stupa Panorama — Lake and Himalayas Together
activities.description: The best free vantage point in Pokhara — Phewa Lake, Annapurna range, and city all at once.

activities.title: Budget Momo Lunch at Street Stall
activities.description: 10 steamed buffalo momos for NPR 120 at the local stalls near the lake ferry ghat.

activities.title: Unlimited Dal Bhat — Monsoon Edition
activities.description: Second day dal bhat watching the lake — monsoon rain adds to the experience.

activities.title: Free Walk Along Seti River Gorge
activities.description: The milky white river carves through an impossibly narrow gorge — totally free to view from the bridge.

activities.title: Luxury Transfer to Nayapul
activities.description: Begin your luxurious journey with a private, comfortable SUV transfer from your hotel in Pokhara to Nayapul, the starting point for your Ghandruk adventure.

activities.title: Scenic Trek to Ghandruk & Check-in
activities.description: Enjoy a scenic, leisurely trek from Nayapul to Ghandruk, accompanied by a porter for your luggage. Upon arrival, check into your premium guesthouse offering stunning mountain views.

activities.title: Gourmet Gurung Lunch
activities.description: Savor a meticulously prepared gourmet lunch featuring local Gurung delicacies, served with an unparalleled view of the Annapurna range from your luxury accommodation.

activities.title: Sunset Viewpoint & Village Exploration
activities.description: Take a gentle stroll to a prime viewpoint in Ghandruk to witness a spectacular sunset over the Himalayas, followed by a relaxed exploration of the traditional Gurung village architecture.

activities.title: Annapurna Sunrise & Yoga Session
activities.description: Wake up early to experience a breathtaking sunrise over the Annapurna and Machhapuchhre peaks. Follow it with a private, guided yoga session amidst the tranquil mountain air.
activities.location: Hill Top Lodge — Hotels in Ghandruk

activities.title: Gurung Museum & Cultural Insight
activities.description: Delve into the rich history and culture of the Gurung community at the local Gurung Museum, showcasing traditional attire, tools, and historical artifacts.

activities.title: Traditional Gurung Cooking Class
activities.description: Participate in a private cooking class where you'll learn to prepare classic Gurung dishes, gaining hands-on experience with local ingredients and culinary traditions.

activities.title: Leisurely Breakfast & Mountain Views
activities.description: Savor a final luxurious breakfast on your guesthouse terrace, soaking in the last panoramic views of the Annapurna range before departing Ghandruk.

activities.title: Phewa Lake Boating & Island Temple Visit
activities.description: Enjoy a relaxing boat ride on the tranquil Phewa Lake, soaking in the serene atmosphere and visiting the sacred Tal Barahi Temple located on an island.

activities.title: Lakeside Stroll & Local Cuisine
activities.description: Wander through the vibrant Lakeside area, browse local shops for souvenirs, and savor authentic Nepali cuisine for a delightful lunch experience.
activities.formatted_address: 1st Street, Kedareshwor Marga, Lakeside Rd, Pokhara 33700

activities.title: World Peace Pagoda Sunset View
activities.description: Hike or drive to the iconic World Peace Pagoda for panoramic views of Pokhara Valley, Phewa Lake, and a stunning sunset over the Annapurna mountain range.

activities.title: Scenic Journey to Lumbini
activities.description: Embark on a comfortable bus ride from Pokhara to Lumbini, passing through picturesque rural landscapes and agricultural fields.

activities.title: Return Private Transfer to Pokhara
activities.description: Embark on a comfortable and private return journey from Ghandruk (via Nayapul) back to your luxury hotel in Pokhara, enjoying the changing landscapes.

activities.title: Luxury Lakeside Dining
activities.description: Indulge in a sophisticated lunch at a high-end restaurant along Phewa Lake, offering exquisite cuisine and serene waterfront views.

activities.title: International Monasteries Tour (Part 1)
activities.description: Begin exploring the serene Monastic Zone, visiting some of the beautifully diverse international monasteries built by various Buddhist nations, each with unique architecture.
activities.location: Japanese Monastery Lumbini日本寺、ルンビニ (Japanese Monastery)
activities.formatted_address: Secred Garden, West Monastery Zone, Lumbini Nepal, Lumbini Sanskritik 32900

activities.title: Domestic Flight to Pokhara
activities.description: Take a scenic domestic flight from Kathmandu to Pokhara, enjoying aerial views of the Himalayas and swift travel to your first destination.

activities.title: Journey to Chitwan National Park
activities.description: Take a scenic bus ride from Lumbini to Sauraha, the bustling gateway to Chitwan National Park, for a change of scenery and adventure.

activities.title: Tharu Cultural Dance Performance
activities.description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture of the indigenous Tharu people with an energetic traditional stick dance and other captivating cultural performances.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner in Sauraha
activities.description: Enjoy a final authentic Nepali dinner in Sauraha, reflecting on your diverse trip before preparing for your onward journey or departure.

activities.title: Descent to Syauli Bazaar
activities.description: Begin your descent from Ghandruk towards Syauli Bazaar, a picturesque village nestled by the Modi Khola river, offering a different perspective of the landscape.
activities.location: Trekking Trail from Ghandruk to Syauli Bazaar

activities.title: Overnight Stay in Syauli Bazaar
activities.description: Check into a teahouse in Syauli Bazaar, relax by the river, and enjoy a well-deserved dinner after a day of trekking.

activities.title: Complete Trek to Nayapul
activities.description: Enjoy a final stretch of trekking, completing your journey back to Nayapul, where your Annapurna adventure began.
activities.location: Trekking Trail from Syauli Bazaar to Nayapul

activities.title: Travel back to Pokhara
activities.description: Catch a shared jeep or local bus from Nayapul back to Pokhara, returning to the comfort of the city.

activities.title: Explore Devi's Fall and Gupteshwor Cave
activities.description: Visit the mysterious Devi's Fall, a unique waterfall, and then explore the sacred Gupteshwor Cave located directly opposite.
activities.location: Devi's Fall and Gupteshwor Cave, Pokhara

activities.title: Evening Serenity & Local Dinner
activities.description: Enjoy a peaceful evening reflecting on the day's spiritual journey, followed by dinner at your hotel or a local restaurant in Lumbini.

activities.title: International Monasteries Tour (Part 2)
activities.description: Continue your exploration of the Monastic Zone, visiting more unique monasteries that showcase diverse architectural styles and Buddhist traditions from around the world.

activities.title: Arrival and Check-in to Lakeside Hotel
activities.description: Travel from your arrival point (bus park or airport) to the vibrant Lakeside area and check into your pre-booked budget-friendly guesthouse.

activities.title: Boating on Phewa Lake
activities.description: Enjoy a relaxing boat ride on the tranquil Phewa Lake, offering stunning reflections of the Annapurna range and Machhapuchhre (Fishtail Mountain).

activities.title: Evening Stroll and Dinner
activities.description: Wander through the lively streets of Lakeside, exploring local shops and enjoying a delicious Nepali dinner at a lakeside restaurant.

activities.title: Travel to Trekking Start Point
activities.description: After an early breakfast, take a shared jeep or local bus from Pokhara to Nayapul or Kimche, the starting point for your Ghandruk trek. Obtain necessary ACAP permits.

activities.title: Begin Trek to Ghandruk
activities.description: Commence your scenic trek through terraced fields, rhododendron forests, and charming villages, gradually ascending to the Gurung village of Ghandruk.
activities.location: Trekking Trail from Kimche to Ghandruk

activities.title: Explore Ghandruk Village and Dinner
activities.description: Upon arrival, settle into your teahouse. Spend the afternoon exploring the traditional Gurung village, enjoying panoramic mountain views, and having dinner at your teahouse.

activities.title: Sunrise Views and Village Exploration
activities.description: Wake up early to witness a breathtaking sunrise over the Annapurna and Machhapuchhre peaks, followed by more exploration of Ghandruk's alleys and traditional houses.

activities.title: Visit Gurung Museum
activities.description: Delve into the rich cultural heritage of the Gurung community by visiting the local museum, showcasing traditional artifacts, clothing, and lifestyle.

activities.title: Dinner at Lakeside
activities.description: Indulge in a celebratory dinner at a restaurant in Lakeside, sharing stories and memories from your trek.

activities.title: Sunrise View from World Peace Pagoda
activities.description: Ascend to the World Peace Pagoda for panoramic views of Pokhara Valley, Phewa Lake, and the Annapurna mountain range at sunrise.

activities.title: Leisure Time and Souvenir Shopping
activities.description: Enjoy some free time for last-minute souvenir shopping or simply relax by the lake, soaking in the serene atmosphere.

activities.title: Final Lunch in Pokhara
activities.description: Savor a final delicious lunch at a cozy cafe in Lakeside before preparing for your departure.

activities.title: Departure from Pokhara
activities.description: Head to the bus park or airport for your onward journey, concluding your memorable trip to Pokhara and the Annapurna region.

activities.title: Pre-Crowd Durbar Square at Dawn
activities.description: Arrive at 6 AM — completely empty squares, golden raking light on the temples. The 55-Window Palace and Vatsala Temple glow without a single tourist in frame.

activities.title: Morning Prayer Rituals at Taumadhi Square
activities.description: Elderly Newaris perform puja before the tourists arrive — light incense smoke, ringing bells, and intimate human moments make for powerful documentary photography.

activities.title: Chiya and People Watching at Dattatreya Square Tea Stall
activities.description: Sit at a roadside stall with a NPR 20 clay-cup chiya — watch the neighbourhood wake up as morning light cuts across Dattatreya Temple's carved facade at a perfect 45-degree angle.

activities.title: Potters at Work — Mid-Morning Light at Pottery Square
activities.description: Potters throw clay on foot-powered wheels in soft diffused light — shoot at f/2.8 to blur the spinning clay and separate the subject from the cluttered background.

activities.title: Juju Dhau Fuel Stop and Nyatapola Guardian Staircase Shots
activities.description: Refuel with king curd in a clay pot, then position at street level on the Nyatapola staircase — five pairs of stone guardian statues create perfect symmetrical leading lines up the pagoda.

activities.title: Warm Afternoon Light Study at 55-Window Palace Facade
activities.description: Return to the main square at 2:30 PM when the sun is low and warm — the 55-Window Palace facade glows amber and deep relief shadows bring each carved window frame into sharp contrast.
